core_stratagems.name: Command Re-roll
core_stratagems.when: Any phase, just after you make an Advance roll, a Charge roll, a Desperate Escape test or a Hazardous test for a unit from your army, or a Hit roll, a Wound roll, a Damage roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, or a roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in that unit. If you are using fast dice rolling (pg 24), this Stratagem can still be used after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.
core_stratagems.target: That unit or model from your army.
core_stratagems.effect: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those rolls or saving throws to re-roll.

core_stratagems.name: Counter-Offensive
core_stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has fought.
core_stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.

core_stratagems.name: Epic Challenge
core_stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a Character unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more Attached units is selected to fight.
core_stratagems.target: One Character model in your unit.
core_stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all melee attacks made by that model have the [PRECISION] ability.

core_stratagems.name: Insane Bravery
core_stratagems.when: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just before you take a Battle-shock test taken for a unit from your army.
core_stratagems.effect: Your unit automatically passes that Battle-shock test.
core_stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

core_stratagems.name: Grenade
core_stratagems.target: One Grenades unit from your army (excluding units that Advanced, Fell Back or have shot this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units
core_stratagems.effect: Select one Grenades model in your unit and one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your Grenades model. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

core_stratagems.name: Tank Shock
core_stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a Vehicle unit from your army ends a Charge move.
core_stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, and select one Vehicle model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Roll a number of D6 equal to the Toughness characteristic of the selected Vehicle model. For each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

core_stratagems.name: Rapid Ingress
core_stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
core_stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is in Reserves.
core_stratagems.effect: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, and if every model in that unit has the Deep Strike ability, you can set that unit up as described in the Deep Strike ability (even though it is not your Movement phase).
core_stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem to enable a unit to arrive on the battlefield during a battle round it would not normally be able to do so in.

core_stratagems.name: Fire Overwatch
core_stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit starts or ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move.
core_stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 24" of that enemy unit and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase.
core_stratagems.effect: : If that enemy unit is visible to your unit, your unit can shoot that enemy unit as if it were your Shooting phase.
core_stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target a Titanic unit with this Stratagem. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit, irrespective of the attacking weapon’s Ballistic Skill or any modifiers. You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

core_stratagems.name: Go To Ground
core_stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
core_stratagems.target: One Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
core_stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have a 6+ invulnerable save and have the Benefit of Cover.

core_stratagems.name: Smokescreen
core_stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
core_stratagems.target: One Smoke unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
core_stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability.

core_stratagems.name: Heroic Intervention
core_stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
core_stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
core_stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.
core_stratagems.restrictions: You can only select a Vehicle unit from your army if it is a Walker. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

army_rules.name: Acts of Faith
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **ADEPTA SORORITAS**, each unit from your army with this ability can perform one Act of Faith per phase. This is done using Miracle dice.

Gaining Miracle Dice

If your Army Faction is **ADEPTA SORORITAS**, you gain 1 Miracle dice:

■ At the start of each battle round.
■ Each time an **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army is destroyed.

Each time you gain a Miracle dice, roll one D6. The number you roll is the value of that Miracle dice. This value cannot be changed or re‐rolled, unless a rule specifically states otherwise. Keep your Miracle dice to one side – this is your Miracle dice pool.

Performing an Act of Faith

Before making a dice roll for a model or unit from your army with the Acts of Faith ability, if you have one or more dice in your Miracle dice pool, that unit can perform an Act of Faith. If it does, select one of the dice from your Miracle dice pool to substitute that dice roll (if a roll involves more than one dice, e.g. a Charge roll or Battle-shock test, only a single dice can be substituted). The dice that is being substituted is not rolled; instead, the value of the selected Miracle dice is used as if it had been rolled (this counts as an unmodified dice roll of that value for all rules purposes). Each Miracle dice can only be selected for substitution once. Once all Miracle dice substitutions have been made, remove the chosen Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool, and roll all remaining, unsubstituted dice that are apart of the dice roll. You can use Miracle dice when a unit performs an Act of Faith for any of the following types of dice roll:

■ Advance roll
■ Battle-shock test
■ Charge roll
■ Damage roll
■ Hit roll
■ Saving throw
■ Wound roll

***Example:** Instead of rolling 2D6 to take a Battle-shock test for a unit, you could use one dice from your Miracle dice pool. If the value of that dice was 4, the unit’s Battle-shock test would be determined by rolling one D6 and adding 4 to it (i.e. it would be D6+4).*

stratagems.name: Passion of the Penitent
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One PENITENT unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a PENITENT model in your unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Lash of Guilt
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just before a PENITENT unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That PENITENT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the PENITENT ENGINES keyword, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Purity of Suffering
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One PENITENT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, PENITENT models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: Final Redemption
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One PENITENT unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Boundless Zeal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit has the PENITENT keyword, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

stratagems.name: Devout Fanaticism
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One PENITENT unit from your army that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: your unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but it must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, models in your unit can be moved within Engagement Range of enemy units.

enhancements.name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a PENITENT unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice then gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

enhancements.name: Verse of Holy Piety
enhancements.description: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement (see the Desperate for Redemption detachment rule). Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer’s unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

enhancements.name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
enhancements.description: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
enhancements.description: CANONESS, PALATINE or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SQUAD unit.

stratagems.name: Righteous Vengeance
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and, if your unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Divine Intervention
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS CHARACTER unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: You can discard 1‐3 Miracle dice. At the end of the phase, set the last destroyed model from your unit back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models. Roll one D3, adding 1 to the result for each Miracle dice you discarded. That model is set back up with that number of wounds remaining (up to its starting number of wounds).
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select SAINT CELESTINE as the target of this Stratagem. You cannot select the same CHARACTER as the target of this Stratagem more than once per battle.

stratagems.name: Suffering and Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY or ADEPTA SORORITAS WALKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects its targets, it must select your unit as the target of its attacks.

stratagems.name: Sanctified Immolation
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

stratagems.name: Praise the Fallen
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

stratagems.name: Spirit of the Martyr
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Saintly Example
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Through Suffering, Strength
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll 1 Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool showing the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Ophelia
enhancements.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

stratagems.name: Shield of Aversion
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Righteous Blows
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of attacks made by those weapons this phase, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Rites of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 6" that is also within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Cleansing Flames
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

stratagems.name: Blazing Ire
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: One unit embarked within your TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

stratagems.name: Carry Forth the Faithful
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just before an ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT model from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT model.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your TRANSPORT, and units can disembark from your TRANSPORT even though it Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge this turn.

enhancements.name: Righteous Rage
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Manual of Saint Griselda
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you just discarded (to a maximum of 6).

enhancements.name: Fire and Fury
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
enhancements.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Shield of Denial
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds instead.

stratagems.name: To The Heart Of Heresy
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Path of the Righteous
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, if your unit is Righteous, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Bastion of Faith
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. In addition, if your unit is Righteous, you can select one other CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit from your army that is not Battle‑shocked and is within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets that CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll as well.

stratagems.name: Suffer Not The Unfaithful
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that is Righteous and that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

stratagems.name: Indefatigable Dedication
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

enhancements.name: Triptych of Judgement
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Mark of Devotion
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Eyes of the Oracle
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Sanctified Amulet
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

stratagems.name: Shield of Faith
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army suffers a mortal wound.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit, or one friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit within 3" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds. If you targeted an ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 3" of your unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Light of the Emperor
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is blessed. While a unit is blessed, it can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws). If your unit has the JUMP PACK keyword, until the end of the turn, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 3" of your unit, that friendly unit is also blessed.

stratagems.name: Faith and Fury
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of your unit’s attacks this phase, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

stratagems.name: Divine Guidance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

stratagems.name: Blinding Radiance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, or one friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit within 3" of such a unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If you targeted an ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 3" of your unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Angelic Descent
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place to into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

enhancements.name: Litanies of Faith
enhancements.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models are destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Divine Aspect
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

army_rules.name: Martial Ka’tah
army_rules.text:
Each time a unit from your army with this ability is selected to fight, select one of the Ka’tah Stances below. Until that unit has finished making its attacks, the selected Stance is active for it and it gains the relevant ability:

Dacatari Stance

Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

Rendax Stance

Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

stratagems.name: Peerless Warrior
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Gilded Champion
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet that states it can only be used ‘once per battle’.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model.
stratagems.effect: Your model can use that ‘once per battle’ ability one additional time during the battle (but not in the same phase).
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem on the same ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model more than once per battle.

stratagems.name: Defiant To The Last
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that model has the CHARACTER keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is treated as having 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Unleash The Lions
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ALLARUS CUSTODIANS or AQUILON CUSTODIANS unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: That unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a Starting Strength of 1.

stratagems.name: Manoeuvre and Fire
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Swift As The Eagle
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding VEHICLE units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: Superior Creation
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Praesidius
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. The bearer has the Lone Operative and Stealth abilities.

enhancements.name: Fierce Conqueror
enhancements.description: SHIELD‐CAPTAIN model only. At the start of the Fight phase, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer for every 5 enemy models within 6" of the bearer (rounding down).

enhancements.name: Admonimortis
enhancements.description: SHIELD‐CAPTAIN model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Slayer of Champions
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER unit from your army that has just destroyed the unit you selected at the start of your Command phase as the target of your Assemblage of Might ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army makes an attack that target that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll. In addition, if the destroyed unit was a CHARACTER unit, gain 1CP.

stratagems.name: The Emperor’s Auspice
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, CHARACTER models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: Earning of a Name
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER units from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a CHARACTER model in either of your units makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Shoulder the Mantle
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army that is not leading a unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly unit (excluding Battle-shocked and Attached units) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your model that it could lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your model attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

stratagems.name: Superhuman Reserves
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES WARLORD model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet or from an Enhancement that says it can only be used ‘Once per battle’.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES WARLORD model.
stratagems.effect: Your model can use its ‘Once per battle’ ability one additional time during this battle (but not in the same phase).
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

stratagems.name: Vigil Unending
stratagems.when: Fight Phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed and has not fought this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not remove your destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Blade Imperator
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Each time the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, all enemy units within 6" of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test.

enhancements.name: Inspirational Exemplar
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 5+. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit that is Battle‑shocked and within 12" of the bearer; that unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.

enhancements.name: Veiled Blade
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, triple the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic until the end of the turn.

enhancements.name: Martial Philosopher
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Once per battle, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Flawless Construction
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.&x20;

stratagems.name: Emperor’s Vengeance
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit has the WALKER keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is assumed to have 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Wrathful Advance
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before an ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army Piles In.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Unstoppable
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Relentless Persecution
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the WALKER keyword, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

stratagems.name: Punishment Inescapable
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Adamantine Talisman
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Augury Uplink
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Honoured Fallen (Aura)
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE model only. While a friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Veteran of the Kataphraktoi
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED model only. In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Arcane Genetic Alchemy
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound has been allocated to an ADEPTUS CUSTODES model from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA models).
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES model’s unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Avenge the Fallen
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. If your unit is Below Half-strength, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those melee weapons instead.

stratagems.name: Unwavering Sentinels
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) that is within range of an objective marker you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Multipotentiality
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that Fell Back this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your turn, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Vigilance Eternal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES BATTLELINE unit from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Archeotech Munitions
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

enhancements.name: From the Hall of Armouries
enhancements.description: SHIELD‑CAPTAIN model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Castellan’s Mark
enhancements.description: SHIELD‑CAPTAIN model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Auric Mantle
enhancements.description: SHIELD‑CAPTAIN or BLADE CHAMPION model only. Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

enhancements.name: Panoptispex
enhancements.description: SHIELD‑CAPTAIN or BLADE CHAMPION model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Witch Hunters
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability, but models in your unit can only target PSYKER units with their attacks.

stratagems.name: Anathema Blademastery
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One VIGILATORS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll. If the target of that attack is Battle‑shocked or a PSYKER, you can re‑roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Purgation Sweep
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One WITCHSEEKERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit. If such a weapon targets a PSYKER or Battle‑shocked unit this phase, add 2 to its Attacks characteristic instead.

stratagems.name: Desperation’s Price
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy PSYKER unit has either finished using a Psychic ability that targets a unit, or finished making Psychic Attacks.
stratagems.target: One ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit from your army within 18" of that enemy PSYKER unit.
stratagems.effect: That enemy PSYKER unit must take a Leadership test. If the test is passed, that PSYKER unit is Battle‑shocked; if the test is failed that PSYKER unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and is Battle‑shocked.

stratagems.name: Psy-chaff Volley
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PROSECUTORS unit from your army that has just shot.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while your unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is prosecuted. While a unit is prosecuted, each time an ANATHEMA PSYKANA model makes an attack against that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. While a PSYKER or Battle‑shocked unit is prosecuted, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Psychic Abominations
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and Battle‑shocked and PSYKER models can only select your unit as a target of a ranged attack if they are within 12".

enhancements.name: Raptor Blade
enhancements.description: ANATHEMA PSYKANA model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy PSYKER units that are Battle‑shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Enhanced Voidsheen Cloak
enhancements.description: ANATHEMA PSYKANA model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made by a PSYKER or Battle‑shocked model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

enhancements.name: Huntress’ Eye
enhancements.description: ANATHEMA PSYKANA model only. In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

enhancements.name: Oblivion Knight
enhancements.description: ANATHEMA PSYKANA model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targeted an enemy PSYKER unit, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Talons Interlocked
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY units from your army, and one enemy unit that is an eligible target for all of those units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your units can only target that enemy unit, but each time a model in one of your units makes a ranged attack, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit and both are within 6" of each other.

stratagems.name: Empyric Severance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit within 6" of that ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic attacks and mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Taloned Pincer
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army that are within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your units can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit and both are within 6" of each other.

stratagems.name: Emperor’s Executioners
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of your units targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit and both are within 6" of each other.

stratagems.name: Shield of Honour
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one other friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY unit (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) within 6" of that ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, any attack that targets your ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit must instead target your other ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit (unless it is not an eligible target).

stratagems.name: Hunt as One
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your units are eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit and both are within 6" of each other.

enhancements.name: Radiant Mantle
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Gift of Terran Artifice
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Champion of the Imperium
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. The range of the bearer’s Null Aegis or Deadly Unity ability is increased to 9".

enhancements.name: Aegis Projector
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for the bearer’s unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

army_rules.name: Doctrina Imperatives
army_rules.text:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Doctrina Imperatives below. Until the end of the battle round, that Doctrina Imperative is active for your army, and all units from your army that have the Doctrina Imperatives ability gain the relevant abilities shown below.

PROTECTOR IMPERATIVE

■ Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[HEAVY]** ability.
■ Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
■ Each time a melee attack targets this unit, if this unit has the **BATTLELINE** keyword and/or it is within 6" of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS BATTLELINE** units, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

CONQUEROR IMPERATIVE

■ Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.
■ Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
■ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, if this unit has the **BATTLELINE** keyword and/or it is within 6" of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS BATTLELINE** units, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Eradication Protocols
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1, and, if it is a HALO OVERRIDE unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Targeting Override
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Guided Retreat
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army makes a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back, and, if it is a HALO OVERRIDE unit, you can re‑roll Desperate Escape tests taken for it.

stratagems.name: Neural Overload
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect:
If your unit is a HALO OVERRIDE unit, it suffers D3 mortal wounds. Select one Override ability. Until the start of your next Command phase, that ability is active for your unit.

Designer’s Note: This means that if the targeted unit already has the HALO OVERRIDE keyword, it can be affected by multiple Override abilities at the same time, but suffers mortal wounds to do so. Alternatively, if your unit does not have the HALO OVERRIDE keyword, it instead has the chosen Override ability until the start of your next Command phase, but does not benefit from any other Override abilities that are active.

stratagems.name: Aggressive Impulse
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One SKORPIUS DUNERIDER model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit disembarks from that model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Analytical Divination
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY unit (excluding KATAPHRON units) from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a HALO OVERRIDE unit.

enhancements.name: Transoracular Dyad Wafers
enhancements.description: CYBERNETICA DATASMITH model only. When the bearer is attached to a KASTELAN ROBOTS unit, until the end of the battle, models in that unit gain the HALO OVERRIDE keyword. That unit cannot be selected when selecting units as part of the Noospheric Transference Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Cognitive Reinforcement
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only (excluding CYBERNETICA DATASMITH models). The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Sanctified Ordnance
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. Add 6" to the range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit and, each time a Hazardous test is taken for that unit, you can re‑roll the result.

enhancements.name: Inloaded Lethality
enhancements.description: TECH‑PRIEST DOMINUS or TECH‑PRIEST MANIPULUS model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

stratagems.name: Motive Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

stratagems.name: Auto-divinatory Targeting
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army, and one objective marker.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have a Ballistic Skill characteristic of 3+ and the [IGNORES COVER] ability, but they can only target units within range of the selected objective marker.

stratagems.name: Benevolence of the Omnissiah
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, which is improved to Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Machine Spirit Resurgent
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Machine Superiority
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back and you can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

stratagems.name: Transcendent Cogitation
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, the Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for your unit.

enhancements.name: Necromechanic
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. Once per battle round, when a saving throw made for a friendly LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE model within 12" of the bearer is failed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If they do, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Lord of Machines
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

enhancements.name: Emotionless Clarity
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. Once per turn, when a friendly LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE model with the Deadly Demise ability that is within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, do not roll to determine whether any mortal wounds are inflicted as a result of that model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

enhancements.name: Arch-negator
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] ability.

stratagems.name: Isolate and Destroy
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SICARIAN, PTERAXII, SYDONIAN, IRONSTRIDER BALLISTARII or SKITARII MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if there are no other enemy units within 6" of the unit targeted by that attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Shroud Protocols
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Programmed Withdrawal
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two SICARIAN units from your army, or one SKITARII INFANTRY or SKITARII MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.restrictions: Each unit targeted with this Stratagem must be more than 3" away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Bionic Endurance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SICARIAN, PTERAXII or SYDONIAN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Expedited Purge Protocol
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Binharic Offence
stratagems.when: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Two SKITARII units from your army that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in both of your units by 1.
stratagems.restrictions: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

enhancements.name: Cantic Thrallnet
enhancements.description: SKITARII MARSHAL model only. At the start of the battle round, you can select one friendly SKITARII unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of the next battle round, the Protector Imperative and the Conqueror Imperative are both active for that unit.

enhancements.name: Clandestine Infiltrator
enhancements.description: SKITARII model only. The bearer, and models in any unit they are leading, have the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

enhancements.name: Veiled Hunter
enhancements.description: SKITARII MARSHAL model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three SKITARII INFANTRY units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Battle-sphere Uplink
enhancements.description: SKITARII model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Incantation of the Iron Soul
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after you allocate a mortal wound to a CULT MECHANICUS model from your army.
stratagems.target: That CULT MECHANICUS model’s unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, CULT MECHANICUS models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Chant of the Remorseless Fist
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a CULT MECHANICUS model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Luminescent Blessing
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, CULT MECHANICUS models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Verse of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a CULT MECHANICUS model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Tribute of Emphatic Veneration
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army and one enemy unit within 18" of it.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Litany of the Electromancer
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of one or more Cult Mechanicus models in your unit, adding 1 to the result if that model is an ELECTRO-PRIEST. On a 5+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Mechanicus Locum
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and, once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly CULT MECHANICUS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

enhancements.name: Mantle of the Gnosticarch
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

enhancements.name: Data-blessed Autosermon
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. Once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, you can select the Benediction of the Omnissiah you did not select at the start of the first battle round. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Benediction of the Omnissiah is active for the bearer’s unit in addition to the one that is currently active for your army.

enhancements.name: Temporcopia
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. The bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

stratagems.name: Priority Reclamation
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", provided your unit ends that Consolidation move within range of your Acquisition objective marker.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target a unit with this Stratagem if it is within 3" of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Auto-oracular Retrieval
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Acquisition objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Cached Acquisition
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Reactive Safeguard
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY unit from your army within range of your Acquisition objective marker that was selected as a target of that charge, and one friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can embark within that TRANSPORT.
stratagems.restrictions: Every model in your unit must be within 3" of that TRANSPORT and there must be sufficient transport capacity to embark the entire unit.

stratagems.name: Infoslave Skull
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TECH-PRIEST model from your army and one objective marker within 24" of that model (excluding your Acquisition objective marker).
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, that objective marker is also considered to be one of your Acquisition objective markers for all rules purposes.

stratagems.name: Incense Exhausts
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS SMOKE unit within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, both of those units have the Stealth ability and the Benefit of Cover.

enhancements.name: Magos
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Genetor
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Logis
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of your Acquisition objective marker, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Artisan
enhancements.description: TECH-PRIEST model only. While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for that unit to an unmodified 6.

stratagems.name: Aggressor Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase. If that unit is BATTLELINE, you can also target one friendly Skitarii unit (excluding BATTLELINE units) within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time one of those units Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Pre-calibrated Purge Solution
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. If that unit is BATTLELINE, you can also target one friendly SKITARII unit (excluding BATTLELINE units) within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those units makes a ranged attack, if the target of that attack is within your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Baleful Halo
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army (excluding VEHICLE units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. If that unit is BATTLELINE, you can also target one friendly SKITARII unit (excluding BATTLELINE units) within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets one of those units from your army, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Bulwark Imperative
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. If that unit is BATTLELINE, you can also target one friendly SKITARII unit (excluding BATTLELINE units) within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in those units from your army have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Extinction Order
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TECH-PRIEST model from your army and one objective marker within 24" of that model.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within range of that objective marker. On a 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound and must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Lethal Dosage
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: Radial Suffusion
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. From the second battle round onwards, when resolving the Fallout effect of the Rad-bombardment Detachment rule, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of your opponent’s deployment zone, in addition to those that are within your opponent’s deployment zone.

enhancements.name: Malphonic Susurrus
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Peerless Eradicator
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Autoclavic Denunciation
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] abilities.

stratagems.name: Precision Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a SICARIAN unit from your army declares a charge.
stratagems.target: That SICARIAN unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Unrelenting Aggression
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit has the SKITARII keyword, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

stratagems.name: Analytic Reprisals
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII Infantry unit from your army that lost one or more models as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

stratagems.name: Servo-Driven Charge
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.&x20;
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Unshackled Wrath
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SKITARlI unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. You can instead select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [LETHAL HITS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities to apply to those weapons until the end of the phase.

stratagems.name: Threat-Cogitation Targeters
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase
stratagems.target: One SKITARII VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to a MONSTER or VEHICLE model, you can re‑roll the Damage roll.

enhancements.name: Omnicogitator
enhancements.description: SKITARII MARSHAL model only. The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Martial Signatum Amplificator
enhancements.description: TECH‑PRIEST model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the SKITARII keyword

enhancements.name: Belicosa-class Capacitor Vanes
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit, and add 1 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons.

enhancements.name: Omnissiah’s Fury
enhancements.description: SKITARII MARSHAL model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

army_rules.name: Battle Focus
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **ASURYANI**, at the start of the battle round, you receive a number of Battle Focus tokens based on the battle size, as shown in the table below.

-

Each time one of the triggers shown in the Agile Manoeuvres section below occurs, you can spend one Battle Focus token to enable the relevant eligible unit to perform that Agile Manoeuvre. A unit is eligible to perform an Agile Manoeuvre if it has this ability and has not already performed an Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot trigger the same Agile Manoeuvre more than once per phase. At the end of the battle round, all unspent Battle Focus tokens are lost.

Agile Manoeuvres

stratagems.name: Staged Death
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
