stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.
stratagems.restrictions: Each model can only be targeted with this Stratagem once per battle.

stratagems.name: Heroes’ Fall
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Mocking Flight
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HARLEQUINS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That HARLEQUINS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Tricksters’ Retort
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One TROUPE unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Bloody Dance
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS INFANTRY or HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge.
stratagems.restrictions: Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

stratagems.name: Exit the Stage
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Cegorach’s Coil
enhancements.description: TROUPE MASTER model only. Each time the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, then roll one D6 for each model in the bearer’s unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

enhancements.name: Mask of Secrets
enhancements.description: HARLEQUINS model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

enhancements.name: Murder’s Jest
enhancements.description: DEATH JESTER model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half‑strength, each successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Mistweave
enhancements.description: SHADOWSEER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

stratagems.name: Death From On High
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield from Reserves this turn and has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Focused Firepower
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Spiralling Evasion
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Overflight
stratagems.when: End of your Shooting phase or the end of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 7".

stratagems.name: Wind of Blades
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Daring Riders
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting up your unit on the battlefield from Reserves, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if your unit is set up within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Firstdrawn Blade
enhancements.description: ASURYANI MOUNTED model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Mirage Field
enhancements.description: ASURYANI MOUNTED model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Seersight Strike
enhancements.description: ASURYANI MOUNTED PSYKER model only. Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI‑MONSTER 2+] and [ANTI‑VEHICLE 2+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Echoes of Ulthanesh
enhancements.description: ASURYANI MOUNTED model only. In your Command phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is not within your deployment zone, and adding an additional 1 to the result if the bearer is within your opponent’s deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

stratagems.name: Fangs of the Brood
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TROUPE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when using your unit’s Dance of Death ability, you can select three of the abilities for your unit to gain, instead of one.

stratagems.name: Venomous Wrath
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: After your unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Striking Stride
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Weaver’s Coils
stratagems.when: End of your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Weaving Stride
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Skyward Lunge
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS VEHICLE or HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Key of Ghosts
enhancements.description: HARLEQUINS model only (excluding SOLITAIRE models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Weaver’s Wail
enhancements.description: TROUPE MASTER model only. Add 3 to the Strength and add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Fanged Leer
enhancements.description: DEATH JESTER model only. When using the bearer’s Cruel Amusement ability, you can select two of the abilities for its shrieker cannon to gain, instead of one.

enhancements.name: Shedskin Raiment
enhancements.description: SHADOWSEER model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three HARLEQUINS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Crushing Strides
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each WRAITHBLADES model in your unit, or roll four D6 if your unit has the WRAITHLORD keyword, or roll six D6 if your unit has the WRAITHKNIGHT keyword: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Seer’s Eye
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI PSYKER model from your army and one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of it that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to your PSYKER model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Armour Penetration and/or Damage characteristics of that attack.

stratagems.name: Wraithbone Armour
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Blades From Beyond
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

stratagems.name: Soul Bridge
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHGUARD or WRAITHLORD unit from your army and one ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHGUARD or WRAITHLORD unit is considered to be within 12" of your PSYKER model for the purposes of the Psychic Guidance and Spirit Guides abilities.

stratagems.name: Spirit Token
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WRAITHBLADES or WRAITHGUARD unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

enhancements.name: Light of Clarity
enhancements.description: SPIRITSEER model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of INFANTRY models in that unit and add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic of MONSTER models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Stave of Kurnos
enhancements.description: SPIRITSEER model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of the bearer (excluding TITANIC units). Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Rune of Mists
enhancements.description: SPIRITSEER model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, unless the attacking model is within 18", models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Higher Duty
enhancements.description: SPIRITSEER model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Macabre Resilience
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI INFANTRY or YNNARI MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Emissaries of Ynnead
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a YNNARI INFANTRY unit from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That YNNARI INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If your unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Soulsight
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities

stratagems.name: Pall of Dread
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Death Answers Death
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units), if one or more models in that unit were destroyed this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase.

stratagems.name: Parting the Veil
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Gaze of Ynnead
enhancements.description: FARSEER model only. The bearer’s Eldritch Storm weapon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

enhancements.name: Storm of Whispers
enhancements.description: WARLOCK model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

enhancements.name: Borrowed Vigour
enhancements.description: ARCHON model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Morbid Might
enhancements.description: SUCCUBUS model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Warding Salvoes
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Shield Nodes
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is within range of one or more objective markers, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Vaul’s Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army
stratagems.target: One WAR WALKERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: After that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Blades of Asuryan
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Dire AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PISTOL] ability.

stratagems.name: Time to Strike
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One STORM GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Cost of Victory
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GUARDIANS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. When doing so, return every destroyed GUARDIANS model to your unit.

enhancements.name: Craftworld’s Champion
enhancements.description: ASURYANI model only. The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

enhancements.name: Ethereal Pathway
enhancements.description: ASURYANI model only. In the Deploy Armies step, select up to two GUARDIANS units from your army. Models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Protector of the Paths
enhancements.description: ASURYANI model only. While the bearer is leading a DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit, once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control.

enhancements.name: Breath of Vaul
enhancements.description: ASURYANI model only. While the bearer is leading a STORM GUARDIANS unit, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a flamer equipped by a model in that unit, you can re‑roll the result, and each time you make a Damage roll for a model equipped with a fusion gun in that unit, you can re‑roll the result.

stratagems.name: Cloudstrike
stratagems.when: Start of the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY and is in Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Deep Strike ability. When your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but if it does, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge. In addition, if your unit is a TRANSPORT, each unit that disembarks from it this turn must be set up more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units and until the end of the turn, is not eligible to declare a charge.&x20;

stratagems.name: Soulsight
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, you can re‑roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll made for a model in your unit. If you are using fast dice rolling, you can select one of those rolls to re‑roll before moving onto the next step of the attack sequence.

stratagems.name: Anti-grav Repulsion
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY and was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Layered Wards
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That AELDARI VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Swift Deployment
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI TRANSPORT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

stratagems.name: Vectored Engines
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That AELDARI VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Guiding Presence
enhancements.description: AELDARI PSYKER model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one friendly AELDARI VEHICLE model within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Harmonisation Matrix
enhancements.description: AELDARI model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of an objective marker you control, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Spirit Stone of Raelyth
enhancements.description: AELDARI PSYKER model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly AELDARI VEHICLE units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly AELDARI VEHICLE model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Guileful Strategist
enhancements.description: AELDARI model only. If your army includes the bearer, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three AELDARI VEHICLE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Pirates’ Due
stratagems.when: The Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit has the ANHRATHE keyword, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Lethal Ruse
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an AELDARI unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That AELDARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If it is an ANHRATHE unit, also select one enemy unit your unit was within Engagement Range of at the start of the phase, and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Outcast Ambush
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] and [RAPID FIRE 1] abilities, and until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Into the Breach
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ANHRATHE unit from your army destroyed one or more enemy units.
stratagems.target: That ANHRATHE unit.
stratagems.effect: After your unit has resolved all of its shooting attacks, it can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

stratagems.name: Cloak and Shadow
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI INFANTRY unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker that you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability and your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Vengeful Sorrow
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI INFANTRY unit from your army, if one or more models in that unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, and if that AELDARI unit is neither Battle‑shocked nor within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 1 to the roll: models in your unit move a number of inches up to this result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Infamy (Aura)
enhancements.description: ANHRATHE unit only. While an enemy unit is within 3" of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

enhancements.name: Webway Pathstone
enhancements.description: ANHRATHE unit only. Models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this ability. If it does, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Archraider
enhancements.description:
ANHRATHE CHARACTER unit only. At the start of the battle, select one CHARACTER model in this unit. That model has the following ability:

Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: Voidstone
enhancements.description: ANHRATHE INFANTRY unit only. Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: No Prey too Big
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ANHRATHE, RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than the highest Toughness characteristic of models in the target unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Yriel’s Example
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Raider’s Spoils
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ANHRATHE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Ruthless Killers
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or Fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Withdraw and Reinforce
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ANHRATHE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If that unit is below Starting Strength, return all destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) to that unit.

stratagems.name: Impeding Fire
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One RANGERS, SHROUD RUNNERS or STARFANG unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) visible to and within 36" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time that enemy unit declares a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

enhancements.name: Pirate Prince
enhancements.description: PRINCE YRIEL unit only. Each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable this unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

enhancements.name: Alacritous Assault
enhancements.description: ANHRATHE unit only. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

enhancements.name: Exotic Munitions
enhancements.description: ANHRATHE unit only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ANTI‑MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Adrenal Infusions
enhancements.description: ANHRATHE INFANTRY unit only. This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Fate Inescapable
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Isha’s Fury
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Presentiment of Dread
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to your model. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Forewarned
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Unshrouded Truth
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that has not been selected to move this phase, was not set up on the battlefield this phase, and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.restrictions: Until the end of the phase, your unit is not eligible to be selected to move.

stratagems.name: Psychic Shield
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Lucid Eye
enhancements.description: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. In your Command phase, you can add 1 to or subtract 1 from the value of one Fate dice in your Fate dice pool.

enhancements.name: Runes of Warding
enhancements.description: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds, Psychic Attacks and Critical Wounds caused by attacks with the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

enhancements.name: Stone of Eldritch Fury
enhancements.description: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. Add 12" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Torc of Morai-Heg
enhancements.description: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of the bearer with a Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, increase the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

stratagems.name: Lightning-fast Reactions
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Blitzing Firepower
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 12". If such a weapon already has that ability, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Skyborne Sanctuary
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ASURYANI unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Feigned Retreat
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ASURYANI unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ASURYANI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Fire and Fade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding AIRCRAFT, ASURMEN and WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASURYANI unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".
stratagems.restrictions: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge or embark within a TRANSPORT.

stratagems.name: Webway Tunnel
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Phoenix Gem
enhancements.description: ASURYANI model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Timeless Strategist
enhancements.description: ASURYANI model only. At the start of the battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within is on the battlefield), you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

enhancements.name: Gift of Foresight
enhancements.description: ASURYANI model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Command Re‑roll Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Psychic Destroyer
enhancements.description: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

stratagems.name: Warrior Focus
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill, Weapon skill, Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Doom Inescapable
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One AVATAR OF KHAINE model from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your model’s Wailing Doom ranged weapon has a Range characteristic of 18" and a Damage characteristic of 8.

stratagems.name: Preternatural Precision
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASPECT WARRIORS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can remove one Aspect Shrine token your unit has (see datasheets). Then, select one of the following abilities, or select two of the following abilities if you removed an Aspect Shrine token during this usage of this Stratagem: [IGNORES COVER], [LETHAL HITS], [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected abilities.

stratagems.name: To Their Final Breath
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can remove one Aspect Shrine token your unit has (see datasheets). Then, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if you removed an Aspect Shrine token during this usage of this Stratagem. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Skyborne Sanctuary
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ASURYANI unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Khaine’s Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: All models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

enhancements.name: Aspect of Murder
enhancements.description: AUTARCH or AUTARCH WAYLEAPER model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and those weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Wisdom
enhancements.description: AUTARCH or AUTARCH WAYLEAPER model only. While the bearer is leading an ASPECT WARRIORS unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, until the end of the phase, models in that unit gain both of the abilities from the Path of the Warrior Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Shimmerstone
enhancements.description: AUTARCH or AUTARCH WAYLEAPER model only. While the bearer is leading an ASPECT WARRIORS unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Strategic Savant
enhancements.description: AUTARCH or AUTARCH WAYLEAPER model only. While the bearer is leading an ASPECT WARRIORS unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

army_rules.name: Assigned Agents
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM**, then in the Select Detachment Rules step, you can select one of the available Detachments from this publication as normal.

If your Army Faction is not **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM**, but every model in your army has the **IMPERIUM** keyword, you can include **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM** units in your army even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. In this case, the maximum number of **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM** units you can include in your army depends on the battle size, as shown below.

-

Note that you can include **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM DEDICATED TRANSPORT** units in such an army as normal, but each unit must start the battle with one or more units embarked within it, or it cannot be deployed for that battle and will count as having been destroyed during the first battle round.

stratagems.name: Close-quarters Barrage
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One VOIDFARERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Masters of the Void
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One VOIDFARERS CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army that is arriving from Strategic Reserves this turn can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

stratagems.name: Selfless Bodyguard
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM Attached unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack with the [PRECISION] ability is allocated to a CHARACTER model in your unit, if there are one or more Bodyguard models in your unit, roll one D6: on a 2+, that attack is allocated to a Bodyguard model of your choice in your unit instead.

stratagems.name: Emperor’s Will
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Violent Acquisition
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [LANCE] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

stratagems.name: Displacer Field
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM CHARACTER unit from your army (excluding OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save and, after the attacking unit has resolved its attacks, unless your unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" (when doing so, models in this unit move as if they have the FLY keyword).

enhancements.name: Digital Weapons
enhancements.description: AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, roll three D6: for each 4+, one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer suffers 1 mortal wound. Mortal wounds inflicted by this Enhancement are allocated as if they had the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Clandestine Operation
enhancements.description: AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY units from your army (excluding GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD units) – those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Fleetmaster
enhancements.description: VOIDFARERS model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Violent Acquisition, Masters of the Void or Close‐quarters Barrage Stratagems for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Combat Landers
enhancements.description: VOIDFARERS model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three VOIDFARERS units from your army – those units gain the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Dispense Justice
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Execution Order
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy CHARACTER unit on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in your unit targets that CHARACTER unit, its weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Line of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can target enemy units that are within Engagement Range of one or more friendly units with ranged weapons (excluding Blast weapons), provided the target is within 12".

stratagems.name: Exact Punishment
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army is destroyed as the result of an enemy unit’s attacks.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS unit from your army that was within 6" of the destroyed unit (you cannot target the destroyed unit with the Stratagem).
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

stratagems.name: Inviolate Jurisdiction
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS INFANTRY unit from your army within range of an objective marker and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Stun Grenades
stratagems.when: Start of any phase (excluding the Command phase).
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS GRENADES unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS or VEHICLES) within 8" of and visible to your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‐shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Liber Heresius
enhancements.description: INQUISITOR or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: No Escape (Aura)
enhancements.description: INQUISITOR model only. While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time it is selected to Fall Back it must first take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

enhancements.name: Witch Hunter
enhancements.description: INQUISITOR or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a PSYKER unit, you can re‐roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Ignis Judicium
enhancements.description: INQUISITOR or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer’s ranged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS], [MELTA 1] and [PRECISION] abilities.

stratagems.name: Prime Target
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If that attack is made by an OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model and it targets the enemy WARLORD, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Hyperstimms
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit. In addition, if it is an EVERSOR ASSASSIN unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: Will-sapping Salvo
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, if it is a CULEXUS ASSASSIN unit, until the end of the phase, change the Damage characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit to 3.

stratagems.name: Orbital Oversight
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18", or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6".

stratagems.name: Blind Grenades
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM GRENADES or VINDICARE ASSASSIN unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit, or, if your unit is a VINDICARE ASSASSIN, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit instead.&x20;

stratagems.name: Ensnaring Trap
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can declare a charge. When doing so, you must select one or more of those enemy units as the targets of that charge, and your unit does not receive a Charge bonus this turn. In addition, if it is a CALLIDUS ASSASSIN unit and it makes a Charge move as a result of this Stratagem, until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Tactics
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Furor Tactics, Malleus Tactics or Purgatus Tactics. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Deathwatch Mission Tactic is active for your unit instead of any other Deathwatch Mission Tactic that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Deathwatch Mission Tactic this battle.

stratagems.name: Rapid Tactical Relocation
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One INQUISTOR or DEATHWATCH INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Hellfire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons (excluding Devastating Wounds weapons) equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI‐INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI‐MONSTER 5+] abilities.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Kraken Rounds or Dragonfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

stratagems.name: Dragonfire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Kraken Rounds or Hellfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

stratagems.name: Kraken Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 and improve the Range characteristic of those weapons by 6".
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Dragonfire Rounds or Hellfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

enhancements.name: Universal Anathema
enhancements.description: AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI‐INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI‐MONSTER 4+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Blackweave Shroud
enhancements.description: AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Beacon Angelis
enhancements.description: WATCH MASTER model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Amulet of Auto-chastisement
enhancements.description: WATCH MASTER model only. At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

stratagems.name: Ritual of Warding
stratagems.when: Start of any Command phase.
stratagems.target: One INQUISITOR, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO MALLEUS unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is said to be Warded and remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Warded and under your control, enemy DAEMON units cannot be set up on the battlefield within 6" of it.

stratagems.name: Rites of Exorcism
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One INQUISITOR, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO MALLEUS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy DAEMON unit within 12" and visible to your unit. That unit must take a Battle‐shock test. If that test is failed, then until the end of the phase, each time a friendly AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit makes an attack that targets that DAEMON unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

stratagems.name: Steel Heart
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Truesilver Armour
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Hexagrammic Wards
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORDO MALLEUS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all Psychic weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

stratagems.name: Psybolt Ammunition
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [PSYCHIC] abilities.

enhancements.name: Formidable Resolve
enhancements.description: INQUISITOR model only. Improve the bearer’s Leadership and Wounds characteristics by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Battle‐shocked unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle‐shocked.

enhancements.name: Daemon Slayer
enhancements.description: INQUISITOR model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons, and those weapons have the [ANTI‐DAEMON 3+] ability.

enhancements.name: Grimoire of True Names (Aura)
enhancements.description: INQUISITOR model only. While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, while an enemy DAEMON unit is within 9" of the bearer, each time a model in that DAEMON unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Gift of the Prescient
enhancements.description: INQUISITOR model only. Once per battle, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. When doing so, you must target a GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army, and when using that Stratagem, that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 3" away from all enemy units.

army_rules.name: Voice of Command
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **ASTRA MILITARUM, OFFICER** with this ability can issue Orders. Each **OFFICER** datasheet will specify how many Orders it can issue in a battle round and which units are eligible to receive those Orders. Each time an **OFFICER** model issues an Order, select one of the Orders below, then select one eligible friendly unit within 6" of that **OFFICER** model to issue it to.

**OFFICER** models can issue Orders in your Command phase and at the end of a phase in which they disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** or were set up on the battlefield.

Until the start of your next Command phase, the unit you selected is affected by that Order. Unless otherwise stated, a unit can only be affected by one Order at a time (any Order subsequently issued to that unit replaces the current one). Orders cannot be issued to Battle-shocked units, and if a unit being affected by an Order becomes Battle-shocked, that Order ceases to affect that unit.

Only **ASTRA MILITARUM**  models gain the benefit of an Order issued to their unit.

MOVE! MOVE! MOVE!

Add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

FIX BAYONETS!

Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

TAKE AIM!

Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

FIRST RANK, FIRE! SECOND RANK, FIRE!

Improve the Attacks characteristic of Rapid Fire weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

TAKE COVER!

Improve the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1 (this cannot improve a model’s Save to better than 3+).

DUTY AND HONOUR!

Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Order the Advance
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one or more friendly ASTRA MILITARUM units within 6" of your unit; until the end of the phase, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for those units.

stratagems.name: Supporting Ordnance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Combined Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover, and each time an ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

stratagems.name: Opening Salvo
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Mobile Firebase
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit from your army Advances or Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Burst of Speed
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that did not Remain Stationary or arrive from Reserves this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: Exemplary Officer
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. Each time the bearer issues an Order to its own unit, you can select up to two other PLATOON units within 3" of the bearer’s unit. That Order is also issued to each of those units.

enhancements.name: Master Manoeuvrist
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT from your army, it can embark within that TRANSPORT.

enhancements.name: Omnissian Unguents (Aura)
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM TECH‑PRIEST ENGINSEER model only. While a friendly ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit is within 3" of the bearer, that unit has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Grand Strategist
enhancements.description: &x20;OFFICER model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer’s unit (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is on the battlefield, select up to two units with the REGIMENT or SQUADRON keywords from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Crack Shots
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Scouting Outriders
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s turn.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED or ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER unit from your army that is wholly within 10" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Draw Them Out
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Courageous Diversion
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and each time an enemy model makes an attack, if your unit is the closest eligible target, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

stratagems.name: Scramble Field
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Reinforcements step.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of your unit.

stratagems.name: Tanglefoot Grenades
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM GRENADES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

enhancements.name: Guerrilla Honours
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer is on the battlefield, select up to three other ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Scare Gas Grenades
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 8" of the bearer’s unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units); that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Survival Gear
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Tripwires
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. Each time an enemy INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit ends a Normal, Advance, Charge or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Blazing Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SQUADRON unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That SQUADRON unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Furious Cannonade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SQUADRON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Final Hour
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One SQUADRON unit from your army that is Below Half-strength (excluding OFFICER units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle round, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding [ONE SHOT] weapons) have the [HAZARDOUS] ability, and each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Tactical Withdrawal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SQUADRON unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That SQUADRON unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Crash Through
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

stratagems.name: Ablative Plating
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack

enhancements.name: Calm Under Fire
enhancements.description: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Once per turn, after the bearer issues an Order to a SQUADRON unit from your army, it can issue the same Order to another SQUADRON unit from your army.

enhancements.name: Indomitable Steed
enhancements.description: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

enhancements.name: Regimental Banner
enhancements.description: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Veteran Crew
enhancements.description: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Accuracy Under Pressure
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Engine of Wrath
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. Until the end of the phase, add 6 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 2, and each time a model in your unit fights, it can only target that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Imposing Arrival
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.&x20;
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Set up your unit on the battlefield, wholly within 8" of the battlefield edge and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Adamantine Behemoth
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Shattering Salvo
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Withering Firepower
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

enhancements.name: Battalion Commander
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC CHARACTER model only. The bearer has the Voice of Command ability and the Officer keyword, and can issue up to 2 Orders to ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC and SQUADRON units.

enhancements.name: Titan Killer
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC CHARACTER model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, you can re‑roll the Damage roll.

enhancements.name: Engine Speaker
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM TECH‑PRIEST ENGINSEER model only. Each time the bearer uses its Omnissiah’s Blessing ability, until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of the selected VEHICLE model.

enhancements.name: Assault Hatches
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC CHARACTER TRANSPORT model only. Each time a unit disembarks from the bearer after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Coordinated Action
stratagems.when: Start of any phase.
stratagems.target: One REGIMENT unit from your army and one SQUADRON unit from your army within 6" of and visible to that REGIMENT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Orders affecting one of your units affect the other, and vice versa.

stratagems.name: Fields of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One REGIMENT unit and one SQUADRON unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time your selected REGIMENT and SQUADRON units make an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Stalwart Protector
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is allocated to an INFANTRY model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of your VEHICLE, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

stratagems.name: Inspired Command
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your OFFICER can issue one Order as if it were your Command phase.

stratagems.name: Reinforcements!
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY REGIMENT unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
