enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Mark of the Hound
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Tyrant’s Lash
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer’s unit, and the bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Persistent Assailants
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more attacks this phase and has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if your unit is Below Half-strength you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Pitiless Cannonade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Point-blank Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit’s ranged weapons (excluding Blast weapons) have the [PISTOL] ability.

stratagems.name: Brutal Attrition
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack is allocated to your unit, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Steadfast Determination
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Siegecraft
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

enhancements.name: Bastion Plate
enhancements.description: CHAOS LORD model only (excluding JUMP PACK models). Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer’s unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Warp Tracer
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

enhancements.name: Ironbound Enmity
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Iron Artifice
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

stratagems.name: From All Sides
stratagems.when: Start of your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to Charge rolls made for your unit for each other HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that made a Charge move this phase (to a maximum of +3).

stratagems.name: Pick Them Off
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Coils of Deception
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Relentless Pursuit
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Scrambled Coordinates
stratagems.when: Start of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your unit.

stratagems.name: Detonator
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy model with the Deadly Demise ability (excluding TITANIC models) is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that was within 18" of that enemy model when it was destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your opponent does not roll to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by their model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted (if that ability inflicts a random number of mortal wounds, your opponent rolls to determine that number as normal).

enhancements.name: Falsehood
enhancements.description: CHAOS LORD model only (excluding TERMINATOR and JUMP PACK models). In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set the bearer up in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly LEGIONARIES or CHOSEN unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and the bearer is set up as close as possible to where that model was destroyed and only within Engagement Range of any enemy units if the destroyed model was within Engagement Range of those units. The bearer now attaches to that unit as its Leader.

enhancements.name: Cursed Fang
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1, and the bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Shroud of Obfuscation
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

enhancements.name: Soul Link
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army (excluding EPIC HEROES). Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer gains the PSYKER keyword, and replace the bearer’s datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the CHARACTER you selected.

stratagems.name: Desperate Pledge
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Possession
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding DAEMON units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, your unit has the DAEMON keyword.

stratagems.name: Glut of Souls
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack that destroys an enemy model, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit regains 1 lost wound after all of its attacks have been resolved (to a maximum of 6 wounds).

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Rampage
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

stratagems.name: Predatory Pursuit
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6", but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Feeding Frenzy
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that is within Engagement Range of your unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

enhancements.name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
enhancements.description: WARPSMITH model only. Add 4" to the bearer’s Move characteristic.

enhancements.name: Tempting Addendum
enhancements.description:
HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer:

• If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.
• Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Forge’s Blessing
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

enhancements.name: Soul Harvester
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

stratagems.name: Vengeful Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY (excluding DAMNED units) or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets your Vendetta target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Corrupted Munitions
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit in your army that has just been selected to shoot.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Never Outgunned
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has just been selected to shoot or fight.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

stratagems.name: Undying Hatred
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Renegade Claim
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Reavers’ Reaction
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: Weaponised Hatred
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Once per battle round, after your Vendetta target is destroyed, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can select one enemy unit visible to the bearer. That enemy unit becomes your Vendetta target until you select a new one.

enhancements.name: Eyes of the Hunter
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Fratricidal Trophies
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. In a turn in which the bearer’s unit chose to Default to Doctrine, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Empyric Symbiote
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

stratagems.name: Depthless Cruelty
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Pitiless Hunters
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Bloody Example
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army destroys a CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Relentless Terror
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Screaming Descent
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge. Then select one enemy INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit within 9" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle‐shock test.

stratagems.name: Merciless Pursuit
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that Fell Back this turn and is within 6" of your unit. Your unit can declare a charge as if it were your Charge phase. When doing so, you can only select that enemy unit as the target of that charge (and only if it is an eligible target). Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

enhancements.name: Night’s Shroud
enhancements.description: CHAOS LORD model only (excluding TERMINATOR models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Willbreaker
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Warp-Fuelled Thrusters
enhancements.description: JUMP PACK CHAOS LORD model only. At the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Eater of Dread
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP

stratagems.name: Chosen for Glory
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Infernal Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds (in addition to any suffered for failing the resulting Leadership test), and until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the melee weapons equipped by models in your unit, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Crazed Focus
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Selfless Demise
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all of its attacks have been resolved.

stratagems.name: Reckless Haste
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Mortal Thralls
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly DAMNED unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, while your DAMNED unit is on the battlefield, each time your opponent would make a Wound roll for an attack that targets your HERETIC ASTARTES unit, if your DAMNED unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no roll is made; instead, your DAMNED unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: Cultist’s Brand
enhancements.description: DARK APOSTLE or DAMNED model only. If every other model in the bearer’s unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is DAMNED, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
enhancements.description: DARK APOSTLE model only. In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed DAMNED models (excluding CHARACTER models) to the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Incendiary Goad
enhancements.description: DARK APOSTLE or DAMNED model only. While the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by DAMNED models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

enhancements.name: Warped Foresight
enhancements.description: DARK APOSTLE or DAMNED model only. While the bearer is leading a unit with the Scouts 6" ability, every model in the bearer’s unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

stratagems.name: Contemptuous Disregard
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Let the Galaxy Burn
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding TZEENTCH units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and change the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit to 6.

stratagems.name: Endless Ire
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after your focus of hatred is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army (excluding Damned units).
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is considered to be your focus of hatred.

stratagems.name: Bringers of Despair
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that is within Engagement Range of your focus of hatred.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

stratagems.name: Black Crusade
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, and bolt pistols, boltguns and combi-bolters equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability while your unit has not already inflicted 6 wounds this turn using that ability.

stratagems.name: Millennia of Experience
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

enhancements.name: Warmaster’s Gift
enhancements.description: CHAOS LORD model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful Wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

enhancements.name: Eager for Vengeance
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, if the bearer’s unit Fell Back this turn, add 1 to the Hit roll, and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit’s charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

enhancements.name: Eye of Abaddon
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Mark of Legend
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

stratagems.name: Talons Sunk Deep
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle‑shocked and/or Below Half‑strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Prey on the Weak
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle‑shocked and/or Below Half‑strength, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Sadistic Display
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of and visible to your unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) must take a Battle‑shock test.

stratagems.name: Malicious Surge
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Relentless Terror
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Horrific Incursion
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that arrived from Reserves this turn.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) within 12" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Greyveil Hex
enhancements.description:
CHAOS LORD model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
enhancements.description: CHAOS LORD JUMP PACK model only. At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Terrorglut Parasite
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Sorrowscent Vulture
enhancements.description:
CHAOS LORD JUMP PACK model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a WARP TALONS unit.

stratagems.name: Empyric Dislocation
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target the same unit with the Empyric Dislocation and Armour of Corruption Stratagems in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Portal of Spite
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if the closest eligible enemy unit is selected as one of the targets of that charge, add 2 to the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Warp Flicker
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Warp-Tainted
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army, within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Siegebreaker Strike
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army that were set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your units have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Armour of Corruption
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army  that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target the same unit with the Armour of Corruption and Empyric Dislocation Stratagems in the same phase.

enhancements.name: Infernal Fulgurite
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Warp
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model with the Deep Strike ability only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Akshur’s Binding Runes
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Tzagulla
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model with the Deep Strike ability only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s weapons by 1. In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, until the end of the turn, improve the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Profane Zeal
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHAOS UNDIVIDED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Eye of the Gods
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army (excluding DAMNED, DAEMON AND EPIC HERO units) destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER model in that unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Move, Toughness and Wounds characteristics of that Character model, and add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of that CHARACTER models melee weapons.

stratagems.name: Skinshift
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, if your unit is a TZEENTCH unit below its Starting Strength, one destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) is returned to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

stratagems.name: Eternal Hate
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a KHORNE unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Torpefying Refrain
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a SLAANESH unit, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Festering Miasma
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability. In addition, if your unit is a NURGLE unit, it can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES KHORNE model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3: until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Eye of Tzeentch
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES TZEENTCH model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Orbs of Unlife
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES NURGLE model only. At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Intoxicating Elixir
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES SLAANESH model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer shoots or fights, if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Touch of the Arkifane
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit is selected to make a Dark Pact, you can select both abilities for that unit’s weapons to gain.

stratagems.name: Balefire Boon
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Soul-Tally Offerings
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Biomechanoid Regeneration
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units).
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. If your unit has the SOUL FORGE keyword, one model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Forge-Fire Surge
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army Advances.&x20;
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the SOUL FORGE keyword, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

stratagems.name: Unholy Fortitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

enhancements.name: Wyredjinn
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Cybinfernal Font
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the SOUL FORGE keyword.

enhancements.name: Mark of the Soul Forges
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Each time the bearer makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Crown of Worms
enhancements.description: &x20;WARPSMITH model only. Add 3” to the range of the bearer’s Warpsmith, Master of Mechanisms and Enrage Machine Spirits abilities

stratagems.name: Monstrous Visages
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Masters Are Watching
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, subtracting 1 from the result if it is a DAMNED unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Diabolic Regeneration
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit (excluding DAMNED units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: One destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) is returned to your unit. If your unit is a BATTLELINE unit, D3 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) are returned to your unit instead.

stratagems.name: Autostimulants
stratagems.when: Start of your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Specimens For The Spider
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll. After your unit has fought, if one or more enemy CHARACTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one enemy unit within 6" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. If the enemy WARLORD was destroyed as a result of those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle‑shock test instead.

stratagems.name: Delayed Mutations
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit (excluding DAMNED units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then select one augmentation (see Experimental Augmentations). Until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have the selected augmentation in addition to any other augmentations they have.

enhancements.name: Surgical Precision
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model (excluding DAMNED models) only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Living Carapace
enhancements.description: CHAOS LORD model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Helm of All-Seeing
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

enhancements.name: Prime Test Subject
enhancements.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

army_rules.name: Nurgle’s Gift (Aura)
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **DEATH GUARD,** while an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of one or more **DEATH GUARD** models from your army, it is Afflicted (see below).

CONTAGION RANGE

Contagion Range changes over the course of the battle:

-

-

-

Afflicted

During the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of the Plagues below. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is Afflicted, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit, and that unit has the effect of your chosen Plague.

*This horrifying affliction sees the minds and senses of the victim gnawed gradually away from within.*

Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

*Limbs shuddering with fever palsy, bones turned brittle as glass, these warriors can barely act to defend themselves.*

Worsen the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1.

*Victims of this insidious ailment become glassy eyed and morose as their very animus and essence decay.*

Worsen the Move, Leadership, and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1 (this rule can only worsen a model’s Objective Control characteristic to a minimum of 1).

army_rules.name: Pact of Decay
army_rules.text: When mustering your army, unless specifically stated otherwise, you cannot select **PLAGUE LEGIONS** as your Army Faction.

stratagems.name: Disgustingly Resilient
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Leechspore Eruption
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD model your army that has lost one or more wounds.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 3" of your model. Roll a number of D6 equal to the number of wounds your model has lost: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds) and your model regains 1 lost wound (to a maximum of 6 lost wounds).

stratagems.name: Plaguesurge
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Your DEATH GUARD WARLORD that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models from your army.

stratagems.name: Putrid Detonation
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE or DEATH GUARD MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted. In addition, any enemy units that suffer mortal wounds as a result of this Stratagem are Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Generosity
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a DEATH GUARD unit from your army selects that enemy unit as the target of any ranged attacks, you can re-roll the dice to determine how many attacks a weapon equipped by a model in that unit makes.

stratagems.name: Creeping Blight
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Furnace of Plagues
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons, and the bearer’s melee weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

enhancements.name: Arch Contaminator
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Revolting Regeneration
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Droning Horror
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit within half range, you can re‐roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Myphitic Invigoration
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more friendly MYPHITIC BLIGHT‐HAULER units and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Vermin Cloud
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a Pile‐in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Enervating Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army makes a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES). Roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that unit, adding 1 to the result if that model is not a CULTIST or POXWALKER model: for each 5+, the selected enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Nauseating Paroxysms
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. That unit must take a Battle‐shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: Eye of the Swarm
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding Blast weapons) have the [PISTOL] ability.

enhancements.name: Droning Chorus
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD INFANTRY model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

enhancements.name: Insectile Murmuration
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD INFANTRY model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, re‐roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Rejuvenating Swarm
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD INFANTRY model only. At the end of each phase, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Plagueveil
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD INFANTRY model only. While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers that you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Clutching Corruption
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Persistent Pests
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One NURGLINGS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with its full wounds remaining.

stratagems.name: All Is Rot
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model’s unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

stratagems.name: Fleshy Avalanche
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Avatars of Decay
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Mireslick
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

enhancements.name: Beckoning Blight
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Each time a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 9".

enhancements.name: Fell Harvester
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Entropic Knell
enhancements.description: GREAT UNCLEAN ONE only. In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

enhancements.name: Tome of Bounteous Blessings
enhancements.description: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. Each time a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a BATTLELINE unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).

stratagems.name: Blessings of Filth
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Grotesque Fortitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Malignance Magnified
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Rabid Infusion
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that includes two CHARACTER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

stratagems.name: Mobile Vector
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army that is not leading a unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one other friendly DEATH GUARD unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and Attached units that already have two Leader units or one of your CHARACTER units leading it) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your unit that your unit can lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your unit attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

stratagems.name: Death’s Heads
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) that is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit has the effect of all Plagues (see Nurgle’s Gift).

enhancements.name: Final Ingredient
enhancements.description: BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER only. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit has fought, if one or more CHARACTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.

enhancements.name: Visions of Virulence
enhancements.description: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer’s Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.

enhancements.name: Needle of Nurgle
enhancements.description: PLAGUE SURGEON only. Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit (instead of 1).

enhancements.name: Cornucophagus
enhancements.description: LORD OF POXES only. In the Declare Battle Formations step select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

stratagems.name: Drawn to Despair
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) within your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Font of Filth
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Eyestinger Storm
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Command phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker visible to one or more models in your unit. Each Afflicted enemy unit within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Stinking Mire
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

stratagems.name: Relentless Grind
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Blighted Land
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one terrain feature within 24" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, enemy units are Afflicted while they are within 3" of that terrain feature.

enhancements.name: Eye of Affliction
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Bilemaw Blight
enhancements.description: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon.

enhancements.name: Shriekworm Familiar
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Tendrilous Emissions
enhancements.description: LORD OF VIRULENCE only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly DEATH GUARD VEHICLE units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those VEHICLE units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Gnawing Hunger
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, and add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Grip of the Walking Pox
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has fought, roll one D6 for each model from your unit that was destroyed as a result of those attacks: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If your unit is not destroyed after the attacking unit has fought, enemy models destroyed as a result of this Stratagem count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a model in your unit for the purposes of the Curse of the Walking Pox ability.

stratagems.name: Smeared With Filth
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that made one or more attacks that targeted your unit this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Hidden Amongst The Dead
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves and that is not an Attached unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Shock and Horror
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That DEATH GUARD unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Shambling Wall
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase.just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly POXWALKERS unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your DEATH GUARD unit, if your POXWALKERS unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead a number of POXWALKERS from your POXWALKERS unit equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack are destroyed.

enhancements.name: Witherbone Pipes
enhancements.description: NOXIOUS BLIGHTBRINGER only. While the bearer is leading a POXWALKERS unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Walking Pox
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. If the bearer is leading a POXWALKER unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

enhancements.name: Sorrowsyphon
enhancements.description: MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER only. While the bearer is leading a POXWALKERS unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer’s unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer’s unit are destroyed.

enhancements.name: Talisman of Burgeoning
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of POXWALKERS models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Grim Reapers
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Blooming Pestilence
stratagems.when: Start of any phase.
stratagems.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Signal Pox
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LORD OF VIRULENCE model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker within 30" of and visible to your model. Until the start of your next turn, while an enemy unit is within range of that objective marker, that unit is Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Undying Spite
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Mortarion’s Teachings
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [HEAVY] abilities.

stratagems.name: Sickening Impact
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a TERMINATOR unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That TERMINATOR unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

enhancements.name: Face of Death
enhancements.description: TERMINATOR model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Vile Vigour
enhancements.description: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Warprot Talisman
enhancements.description: TERMINATOR model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Helm of The Fly King
enhancements.description: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

army_rules.name: Power From Pain
army_rules.text:
Pain Abilities

All **DRUKHARI** units have a Pain ability, tagged with the word ‘Pain’. Pain abilities only apply to a unit while it is Empowered. If your Army Faction is **DRUKHARI**, you can Empower units from your army with Pain abilities by spending Pain tokens (see below).

**Designer’s Note:** *You can also spend Pain tokens to activate additional effects in certain other rules such as Enhancements and Stratagems.*

Gaining Pain Tokens

If your Army Faction is **DRUKHARI**, you gain Pain tokens as follows:

■ **1 Pain token** at the start of your Command phase.
■ **1 Pain token** each time an enemy unit is destroyed.
■ **1 Pain token** each time an enemy unit fails a Battle‑shock test.

Each time you gain a Pain token, keep it to one side – this is your Pain token pool. Each time you spend a Pain token, reduce your Pain token pool by the same amount.

Empowered Through Pain

Each Pain ability will state when you can spend Pain tokens to Empower that unit. When you do, until the end of the phase, that unit is Empowered and all Pain abilities it has take effect. While an Attached unit is Empowered, the Pain abilities of all Leader and Bodyguard units in that unit take effect – you do not need to spend additional Pain tokens to activate each of those Pain abilities.

**Example**: *At the start of your Charge phase, you spend 1 Pain token to Empower a unit of Wyches. The unit becomes Empowered, and so its Acrobatic Gladiators ability takes effect until the end of the phase. A Succubus is leading the unit, and so its Lithe Agility ability also takes effect until the end of the phase (no additional Pain token is required to activate that ability as well).*

army_rules.name: Corsairs and Travelling Players
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **DRUKHARI**, you can include **HARLEQUINS** and **ANHRATHE** units in your army, even though they do not have the **DRUKHARI** Faction keyword. The combined points value of **HARLEQUINS** and/or **ANHRATHE** units you can include in your army depends on the battle size, as follows:

■ **Incursion:** Up to 250 pts
■ **Strike Force:** Up to 500 pts
■ **Onslaught:** Up to 750 pts

No **HARLEQUINS** or **ANHRATHE** models included in your army in this way can be your **WARLORD**, and they cannot be given Enhancements.

stratagems.name: Deadly Debut
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a WYCHES unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Acrobatic Display
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WYCH CULT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: A Challenge Met
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WYCH CULT unit from your army that would be able to declare a charge if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 9" of your unit that was set up on the battlefield this phase or that ended a Normal or Advance move this phase. Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge.
stratagems.restrictions: Even if that charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

stratagems.name: Feigned Weakness
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DRUKHARI unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That DRUKHARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Preternatural Agility
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement or Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One WYCH CULT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, you can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it and, until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes such a move, it can move horizontally through models (when doing so, such a model can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end a Normal or Advance move within Engagement Range of them).

stratagems.name: Berserk Fugue
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WYCH CULT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Pharmacophex
enhancements.description: SUCCUBUS model only. At the start of your Command phase, after selecting which Combat Drugs will be active for your army, roll one D6 and consult the Combat Drugs list (see Detachment Rule). The result rolled applies to the bearer’s unit until the start of your next Command phase in addition to any other Combat Drugs that are active for your army. If you randomly select one that is already active for your army, it has no additional effect.

enhancements.name: Chronoshard
enhancements.description: SUCCUBUS model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Periapt of Torments
enhancements.description: SUCCUBUS model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Morghenna’s Curse
enhancements.description: SUCCUBUS model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Taken Alive
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your Contract unit is destroyed as a result of those attacks, every unit in your opponent’s army must take a Battle‑shock test. You cannot gain more than 3 Pain tokens as a result of failed Battle‑shock tests caused by this Stratagem.

stratagems.name: Making A Point
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One KABALITE WARRIORS or HAND OF THE ARCHON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Tailored Toxins
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KABAL or BLADES FOR HIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets your Contract unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Enemies Without Number
stratagems.when: Your Command phase, just after you complete a Contract (see Murderous Agenda Detachment rule).
stratagems.target: One ARCHON WARLORD from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one new Contract from those listed in the Murderous Agenda Detachment rule (this can be one you have already completed), then select one unit from your opponent’s army that is on the battlefield and matches the ‘Contract’ description in that Contract. Until that Contract is completed, that unit is your Contract unit and the Murderous Agenda Detachment rule applies as normal.

stratagems.name: Double-cross
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One KABAL or BLADES FOR HIRE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly DRUKHARI unit (excluding VEHICLES).
