stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your KABAL or BLADES FOR HIRE unit, if your DRUKHARI unit is within Engagement Range of the attacking model, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead, your DRUKHARI unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Deadly Deceivers
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One KABAL or BLADES FOR HIRE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Leechbite Plate
enhancements.description: ARCHON model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+. At the start of either player’s Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token: if you do, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Webway Awl
enhancements.description: ARCHON model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability, and you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Informant Network
enhancements.description: ARCHON model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select up to three KABALITE WARRIORS and/or HAND OF THE ARCHON units from your army; those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Towering Arrogance
enhancements.description: ARCHON model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Skyborne Annihilation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, or the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability if your unit is a KABALITE WARRIORS or HAND OF THE ARCHON unit.

stratagems.name: Vicious Blades
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a DRUKHARI TRANSPORT from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: After your TRANSPORT has fought, select one enemy unit that was the target of one or more of those attacks and roll one D6 for each model embarked within your TRANSPORT, adding 1 to the result if that embarked model is a WRACKS model: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Wraithlike Retreat
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI INFANTRY unit from your army that fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move, but unless it is a WYCHES unit, it must end that move wholly within 3" horizontally and 5" vertically of a friendly DRUKHARI TRANSPORT and must embark within that TRANSPORT at the end of that move (otherwise, it cannot make that move).

stratagems.name: Pounce on the Prey
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DRUKHARI INFANTRY unit from your army disembarks from a TRANSPORT that made a Normal move this phase.
stratagems.target: That INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Swooping Mockery
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI TRANSPORT from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your TRANSPORT can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Night Shield
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Phantasmal Smoke
enhancements.description:
DRUKHARI model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within 6" of a friendly DRUKHARI TRANSPORT:

■ Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.
■ Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer’s unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Sadistic Fulcrum
enhancements.description: DRUKHARI model only. Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower the bearer’s unit in the Shooting phase, select one friendly DRUKHARI TRANSPORT within 6" of the bearer’s unit; until the end of the phase, each time that TRANSPORT makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Spiteful Raider
enhancements.description: DRUKHARI model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase, if that enemy unit was within range of one or more objective markers when the bearer’s unit was selected to fight, you gain 1 additional Pain token.

enhancements.name: Nightmare Shroud
enhancements.description: DRUKHARI model only. Each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a TRANSPORT, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

stratagems.name: Malicious Frenzy
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

stratagems.name: Murderer’s Circus
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Shorten The Odds
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit from your army has Advanced.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Scintillating Tempo
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase, just after a DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit from your army is selected to make a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, is set up on the battlefield, or declares a charge.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at your unit.

stratagems.name: Fateful Role
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is losing the wager: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Dance Macabre
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI INFANTRY or HARLEQUINS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit is currently losing the wager, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" instead.

enhancements.name: Archraider
enhancements.description: HARLEQUINS or DRUKHARI model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Webway Walker
enhancements.description: HARLEQUINS or DRUKHARI model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if that unit is currently losing the wager, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Reaper’s Cowl
enhancements.description: HARLEQUINS model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth and Infiltrators abilities.

enhancements.name: Conductor of Torment
enhancements.description:
DRUKHARI model only. In your Command phase, you can do one of the following:

■ If your DRUKHARI units are currently losing the wager, you can gain 1 Pain token. If you do, DRUKHARI units from your army are now winning the wager.
■ If your DRUKHARI units are currently winning the wager, you can discard 1 Pain token. If you do, HARLEQUINS units from your army are now winning the wager.

stratagems.name: Fighting Shadows
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit from your army (excluding HAEMONCULUS COVENS units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Instinctive Spite
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two DRUKHARI BATTLELINE units from your army, or one other DRUKHARI unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: You can spend 1 Pain token. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in each of those units makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half‑strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If you spent 1 Pain token, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Eager for the Kill
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two WYCHES units from your army, or one other DRUKHARI unit from your army, that have not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time one of those units Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit (this is not cumulative with the REAVERS’ Matchless Swiftness ability).

stratagems.name: Insensible to Pain
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Dark Harvest
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two WRACKS units from your army, or one other DRUKHARI unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in each of those units have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Raid and Fade
stratagems.when: End of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two KABALITE WARRIORS units from your army, or one other DRUKHARI unit from your army (excluding SCOURGES and AIRCRAFT).
stratagems.effect: Each of those units can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Until the end of the turn, those units are not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Dark Vitality
enhancements.description: DRUKHARI model only. The bearer’s unit is always Empowered – you do not need to spend any Pain tokens to activate that unit’s Pain abilities.

enhancements.name: Labyrinthine Cunning
enhancements.description:
ARCHON model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can do one of the following:

■ Spend 1 Pain token and gain 1CP.
■ Roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Eye of Spite
enhancements.description: SUCCUBUS model only. Improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Crucible of Malediction
enhancements.description: HAEMONCULUS model only. Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can spend 1 Pain token. Then, each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if you spent 1 Pain token. Each time a PSYKER unit fails that test, it suffers 3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Connoisseurs of Pain
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Spend 1 Pain token. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. At the end of the phase, if your unit is still on the battlefield and it is a HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit, you gain 1 Pain token.

stratagems.name: Postmortality
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HAEMONCULUS model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Spend 1‑3 Pain tokens. At the end of the phase, set the destroyed model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with a number of wounds remaining equal to the number of Pain tokens you just spent.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem if you have 0 Pain tokens, and you cannot target the same HAEMONCULUS model with this Stratagem more than once per battle.

stratagems.name: Symphony of Suffering
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a DRUKHARI unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: That DRUKHARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 9" of and visible to your unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if your unit is a HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit.

stratagems.name: Poisoner’s Art
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit from your army has fought.
stratagems.target: That HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) hit by one or more of your unit’s attacks this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned unit on the battlefield: on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Enfolding Nightmare
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: your unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but it must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Distillers of Fear
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Battle‑shocked, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

enhancements.name: Master Regenesist
enhancements.description: HAEMONCULUS model only. Each time the bearer uses its Fleshcraft ability, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed Bodyguard models to the bearer’s unit instead of D3+1.

enhancements.name: Master Nemesine
enhancements.description: HAEMONCULUS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [ANTI‑BEAST 2+] and [ANTI‑MONSTER 4+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Master Artisan
enhancements.description: HAEMONCULUS model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Master Repugnomancer (Aura)
enhancements.description: HAEMONCULUS model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer’s Fear Incarnate ability, and each time a friendly DRUKHARI unit within 9" of the bearer fails a Battle‑shock test or is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.

army_rules.name: Cult Ambush
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **GENESTEALER CULTS**, you start the battle with a number of Resurgence points, depending on the battle size, as shown below.

■ **Incursion**: 6 Resurgence points
■ **Strike Force**: 10 Resurgence points
■ **Onslaught**: 14 Resurgence points

Each time a unit from your army is destroyed, if every model in that unit has this ability, you can spend the relevant number of Resurgence points shown below based on that unit’s Starting Strength.

-

If you do:

■ Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any **[ONE SHOT]** weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
■ Place one Cult Ambush marker (see below) anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed).

Units in Cult Ambush

Cult Ambush is a type of Strategic Reserves. Units in Cult Ambush cannot be targeted with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem, but can be set up on the battlefield using a Cult Ambush marker as described below, or by following the rules for Strategic Reserves in a subsequent turn.

Cult Ambush Markers

Use a circular 32mm diameter marker for Cult Ambush markers. If an enemy model (excluding **AIRCRAFT**) ends any kind of move within 9" of a Cult Ambush marker you placed, that Cult Ambush marker is removed from the battlefield. At the end of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s next Movement phase, for each of your Cult Ambush markers still on the battlefield, you can select one unit from your army that is in Cult Ambush and set up that unit using that Cult Ambush marker. To do so, set that unit up on the battlefield more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units, with at least one model in that unit touching that Cult Ambush marker and all other models placed wholly within 3" of that Cult Ambush marker (that Cult Ambush marker is then removed from the battlefield).

stratagems.name: Symbiotic Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM and one GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that is visible to both of those selected units and within range of at least one ranged weapon from each of those units. Until the end of the phase, models in those units can only make attacks that target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target). When doing so, each time such a model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: In the Shadow of Iron
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers. You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units and wholly within 6" of your unit.

stratagems.name: Regimental Reinforcements
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY REGIMENT unit from your army (excluding ARTILLERY and CHARACTER units) is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That INFANTRY unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 3+, place one Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed) and add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any [ONE SHOT] weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

stratagems.name: Suppress and Overwhelm
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASTRA MILITARUM unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit cannot be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem and each time a GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army selects that enemy unit as a target of a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: A Dark Network
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM or GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 12" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Acceptable Losses
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army. Until the end of the phase, your unit can make ranged attacks that target that enemy unit. If it does, after it has resolved those attacks, roll one D6 for each of those GENESTEALER CULTS units: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Martial Espionage
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Once per turn, when a friendly ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit within 9" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Adaptive Reprisal
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Once per turn, you can target a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit within 9" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: The Hero Returned
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Fire-point Commander
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

stratagems.name: Gene-twisted Muscle
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Hyper-metabolic Vigour
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". In addition, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends it as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Stimulated Bio-surge
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if the closest eligible enemy unit is selected as one of the targets of that charge, add 1 to the Charge roll for each selected target of that charge (including the closest eligible enemy unit), to a maximum of +3.

stratagems.name: Saintly Paroxysm
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.target: That destroyed CHARACTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If that CHARACTER model is an ABOMINANT or PATRIARCH, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Evasive Vanguard
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers, before removing those markers from the battlefield.
stratagems.target: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.effect: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Bio-horror Revelation
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit within 9" of your unit is selected to shoot, it must take a Leadership test, subtracting 1 from the result. If that test is failed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Predatory Instincts
enhancements.description: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Infiltrators ability and, once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Biomorph Adaptation
enhancements.description: ABOMINANT or PATRIARCH model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Mutagenic Regeneration
enhancements.description: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. In each Command phase, one model in the bearer’s unit regains 1 lost wound.

enhancements.name: Alien Majesty
enhancements.description: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).

stratagems.name: Devoted Crew
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GOLIATH ROCKGRINDER or GOLIATH TRUCK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Close-range Shoot-out
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 18".

stratagems.name: Deft Manoeuvring
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS or ATALAN JACKALS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Along Shadowed Trails
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.target: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.effect: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Rapid Feint
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS or ATALAN JACKALS unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Encircling the Prey
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Serpentine Tactics
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Cartographic Data-leech
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. While the bearer is embarked within a TRANSPORT, each time that TRANSPORT is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by that TRANSPORT as a result of the Firing Deck ability by 1.

enhancements.name: Starfall Shells
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Assault Commando
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, you can re‐roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Hyperferocity
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If one or more friendly TYRANIDS units are within 6" of that enemy unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Avenge the Star Children
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS CHARACTER unit from your army that was destroyed by that enemy unit this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a GENESTEALER CULTS model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Divine Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more TYRANIDS units from your army. Until the end of the phase, each time your GENESTEALER CULTS unit declares a charge, if that enemy unit is one of the targets of that charge, add 1 to Charge rolls made for your unit and you can re‑roll the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Psi Surge
stratagems.when: Start of any phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, increase the range of your unit’s Catalyst ability by 3.
stratagems.restrictions: Each time you use this Stratagem, until the end of your next Command phase, you cannot use this Stratagem again.

stratagems.name: Darting Attacks
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Resistance Tunnels
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS or TYRANIDS unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Auger
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Each time the bearer would regain one or more lost wounds from the Psionic Parasitism Detachment rule, it regains up to twice that number of lost wounds instead.

enhancements.name: Enraptured Damnation
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Tyrant
enhancements.description: WINGED HIVE TYRANT model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Inhuman Integration
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 6" of one or more friendly TYRANIDS units.

stratagems.name: Frenzied Devotion
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models (excluding CHARACTERS) in your unit by 1 and those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

stratagems.name: Vengeance for the Martyr!
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.target: One other GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the destroyed model was a MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Tireless Fervour
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. When doing so, if it targets an enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more friendly CHARACTER units, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Transcendent Celerity
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: The Path of Anguish
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a move of up to D6", but it unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, models in your unit can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: The Downtrodden Rise
stratagems.when: End of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army in Cult Ambush.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, you can set up your unit on the battlefield without using a Cult Ambush marker. When doing so, set up your unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Gene-sire’s Reliquant
enhancements.description: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. You can re‐roll Battle‐shock tests taken for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Denunciator of Tyrants
enhancements.description: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Deeds that Speak to the Masses
enhancements.description: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. You start the battle with 2 additional Resurgence points.

enhancements.name: Incendiary Inspiration
enhancements.description: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Coordinated Trap
stratagems.when: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Two GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (if this Stratagem is used in the Fight phase, that enemy unit must be within Engagement Range of both of your units). Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Primed and Readied
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

stratagems.name: Tunnel Crawlers
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit targeted by this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

stratagems.name: Lying in Wait
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS BATTLELINE unit from your army in Cult Ambush.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting your unit up using a Cult Ambush marker, set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of that Cult Ambush marker and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Return to the Shadows
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: A Deadly Snare
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Prowling Agitant
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: A Chink In Their Armour
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time the bearer is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: Our Time is Nigh
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit declares a charge, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Assassination Edict
enhancements.description: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

army_rules.name: Gate of Infinity
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **GREY KNIGHTS,** at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, you can select a number of units (see below) from your army that are on the battlefield (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units), provided every model in those units has this ability. The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:

-

Once you have made your selections, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Aggressive Anticipation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Appointed Hour
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Forewarned Evasion
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS WALKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Necessary End
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. If the result is greater than the current battle round number, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Redirected Strike
stratagems.when: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect:
If your unit has the Deep Strike ability, it can be placed into Strategic Reserves.

Designer’s Note: This Stratagem lets players utilise abilities that retain control of objective markers and react to their missions and objectives with this unit.

stratagems.name: Mirage of Echoes
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that is within 12" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the Deep Strike ability, it can be placed into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Grimoire of Conjunctions
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 4 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Shield of Prophecy
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the battle round, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: One Foot in the Future
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", and until the end of the turn, the bearer’s unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

enhancements.name: Doomseer’s Amulet
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Hexwrought Reprisal
stratagems.when: End of any phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that is on the battlefield and suffered one or more mortal wounds this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit which inflicted one or more mortal wounds on your unit this phase, then roll a number of dice equal to the number of mortal wounds your unit suffered this phase: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). These mortal wounds are Psychic Attacks.

stratagems.name: Warding Chant
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against attacks with an unmodified Damage characteristic of 1.

stratagems.name: Chaos Bane
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-CHAOS 4+] ability.

stratagems.name: Celerity
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

stratagems.name: Circle of Sanctuary
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your model.

stratagems.name: Shadow of Anarch
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" or, if it has the Deep Strike ability, it can be placed into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Sigil of the Hunt
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Ephemeral Tome
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", and until the end of the turn, the bearer’s unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Sixty-sixth Seal
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Pyresoul (Psychic)
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the bearer; that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Fires of Covenant
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 6" of your unit, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if your unit is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground: on a 4+,  that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Aegis Eternal
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit that are wholly within your Hallowed Ground have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Repelling Sphere
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit declares a charge and your unit is one of the targets of that charge, subtract 1 from the Charge roll, or subtract 2 instead if your unit is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground.

stratagems.name: Sanctified Kill Zone
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase and that is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1, or, re‑roll the Wound roll instead if your unit is a PURIFIER SQUAD.

stratagems.name: Hallowed Beacon
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit (excluding TERMINATOR units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Set up your unit wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Flames of Sanctity
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One PURIFIER SQUAD unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of your unit, adding 1 to the result if your unit includes CASTELLAN CROWE: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Mandulian Reliquary
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Radiant Champion
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability, and while the bearer is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground, each time a melee attack made by the bearer scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

enhancements.name: Phial of the Abyss
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Paragon of Sanctity
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can select one friendly GREY KNIGHTS unit within 18" of and visible to it. If it does, until the end of the phase, that unit is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.

stratagems.name: Purgation Pattern
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army that was set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

stratagems.name: Shining Veil
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability.

stratagems.name: Combat Manifestation
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Duty Unending
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more GREY KNIGHTS units from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: One of those GREY KNIGHTS units that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the Deep Strike ability, it can be placed into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Truesilver Channelling
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Psychic weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability,

stratagems.name: Expeditious Exit
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect:
If every model in your unit has the Deep Strike ability, remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Designer’s Note: This Stratagem allows you to remove a unit in addition to those removed using the Gate of Infinity rule, and it allows you to remove a unit within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

enhancements.name: Banishing Wave (Psychic)
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer: on a 2-5, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Blinding Aura
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Purity of Purpose
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Tome of Forbidden Ways
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add 1 to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Gate of Infinity rule.

stratagems.name: Giants of the Battlefield
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Unending Fidelity
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase.just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not shot or fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can shoot or fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Point-Blank Purgation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, storm bolter weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PISTOL] and [TWIN-LINKED] abilities.

stratagems.name: Grind Them Underfoot
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Precognitive Strategies
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Shining Resolve
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Augurim
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Once per battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

enhancements.name: Inescapable Judgement (Psychic)
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit Falls Back, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. These mortal wounds are Psychic Attacks.

enhancements.name: Sanctic Reaper
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Nemesis Rounds
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

stratagems.name: Abominus-Class Targets
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Truesilver Will
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER VEHICLE unit from your army suffers a mortal wound.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Armoured Aegis
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds.

stratagems.name: Redoubled Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Force Wave
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features

stratagems.name: Argent Wrath
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 3" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

enhancements.name: Driven by Duty
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS WALKER model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Piles In or Consolidates, the bearer can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

enhancements.name: Quickening Foci
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY model only. In your Movement phase, each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a TRANSPORT, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Sigil of Exigence
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS model only. Once per battle, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when the bearer’s unit is selected as the target of a ranged attack, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and then set it back up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. If the bearer’s unit is no longer an eligible target, your opponent can then select new targets for any attacks that had targeted the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Spiritus Machina
enhancements.description: GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if the bearer’s unit disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

army_rules.name: Code Chivalric
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS**, at the end of the Read Mission Objectives step, you must determine your army’s Oath for the coming battle. An Oath consists of two parts – one Deed and one Quality. There are three options for each part, shown below.

To determine your army’s Deed, you can either select one Deed or you can randomly select one Deed by rolling a D6 and consulting the relevant table below. The selected Deed will describe what needs to be achieved in order to complete that Deed.

To determine your army’s Quality, you can either select one Quality or you can randomly select one Quality by rolling a D6 and consulting the relevant table below. Until the end of the battle, the ability described in the Quality selected applies to all models in your army with this ability.

The first time your selected Deed is completed your Oath is fulfilled and, until the end of the battle, your army becomes Honoured and you gain 2CP, or 3CP if you randomly selected your Deed and/or Quality (CP gained in this way are an exemption to the Core Rules that limit the maximum number of CP you can gain per battle round to 1).

Deed

At the start of the battle, select one **CHARACTER** model in your opponent’s army. This Deed is completed at the end of a turn if that **CHARACTER** is destroyed.

This deed is completed at the end of your opponent’s turn if you control more objective markers than your opponent.

This deed is completed at the end of the battle round if the number of enemy units destroyed this battle round is greater than the battle round number even if those units are subsequently returned to the battlefield (for example, two destroyed enemy units in the first battle round).

Quality

Each time this model is selected to shoot or fight, you can re‑roll one Hit roll and you can re‑roll one Wound roll.

Add 2” to this model’s Move characteristic and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

Improve this model’s Objective Control characteristic by 2 and its Leadership characteristic by 1.

army_rules.name: Bondsman
army_rules.text: Some **IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** models have a Bondsman ability, tagged with the word ‘Bondsman’. In your Command phase, one or more models from your army with a Bondsman ability can use that ability. For each one that does, select one friendly **ARMIGER** model within 12" of that model (you cannot select an **ARMIGER** model that is already being affected by a Bondsman ability). Until the start of your next Command phase, that **ARMIGER** model is affected by that Bondsman ability.

army_rules.name: Super-heavy Walker
army_rules.text:
Each time a model with this ability makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **TITANIC** models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so:

■ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
■ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after it has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, that model is Battle-shocked.

army_rules.name: Freeblades
army_rules.text: If every model in your army has the **IMPERIUM** keyword, you can include either one **TITANIC IMPERIAL KNIGHTS** model or up to three **ARMIGER** models in your army, even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. None of these models can be your **WARLORD**, and they cannot be given Enhancements.

stratagems.name: Thunderstomp
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, the Attacks characteristic of any armoured Feet melee weapons equipped by your model is 8, the Attacks characteristic of any titanic Feet melee weapons equipped by your model is 12, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Full Tilt
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of your models and add 2 to Advance rolls made for those model’s units.

stratagems.name: Run Them Through!
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by your models have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Vow of Retribution
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by your models have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Tactical Foil
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 9" of that unit.
stratagems.effect: Your model can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Rotate Ion Shields
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Iron Chalice
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. At the end of your Movement phase, select one other IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That selected model regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds if your army is Honoured.

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Evanescent Ion
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. At the end of your Movement phase, select one other IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that selected model has the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Judicant’s Helm
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one other IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by that selected model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Lancer’s Sigil
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. At the start of your Charge phase, select one other IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 12” of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that selected model.

stratagems.name: Bonded Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Command phase, just before an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army uses a Bondsman ability.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: When selecting targets for that use of that Bondsman ability, you can select one friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit within 12" of your unit in addition, or instead of selecting one ARMIGER model. Until the start of your next Command phase, every model in that ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit is affected by that Bondsman ability.

stratagems.name: Machine Focus
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any Hit roll or Wound roll made for it.

stratagems.name: Aggression Begets Aggression
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army and one friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit that is within 6" of that unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your units have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Thronegheist Fury
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army that is within 24" of and visible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one ranged weapon equipped by a model in your unit. That model can shoot at that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target). When doing so, that model can only make attacks with that weapon and each time it makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit, irrespective of the attacking weapon’s Ballistic Skill or any modifiers.

stratagems.name: Omnissiah’s Grace
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Vengeance of the Machine Cult
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, the enemy unit that destroyed your unit is Marked. Each time an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model from your army makes an attack that targets a Marked unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: Omnissian Champion
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Add 4 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

enhancements.name: Knight of the Opus Machina
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, if the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS units, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Magos Questoris
enhancements.description: TECH‑PRIEST model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly IMPERIAL KNIGHTS units, it has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, select one friendly IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to 2 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Vocifer Magnificat (Aura)
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. While a friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit is within 6" of the bearer, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Drive Them Out!
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit on your defensive line, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Steadfast Superiority
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that is on your defensive line and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Marshal the Defence
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two IMPERIAL KNIGHTS units from your army that have not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in your units.

stratagems.name: Titanic Bombardment
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army that Remained Stationary this turn, that is on your defensive line and that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability.

stratagems.name: Fortress of Intimidation
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army that is on your defensive line.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, that unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: Lancebreaker
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is on your defensive line.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Acquisitor-at-Arms
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While the bearer is on your defensive line and there are no enemy units on your defensive line, add the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic to that of each model affected by the bearer’s Bondsman ability.

enhancements.name: Purgation’s Hand
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is on your defensive line, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Augury Halo
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, while the bearer is on your defensive line, weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Vengeful Tread
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Once per turn, you can target the bearer with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP.

stratagems.name: Virtue of Courage
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER model from your army, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time one of your ARMIGER models makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Exemplar’s Wisdom
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time one of your ARMIGER models makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Thin Their Ranks
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER model from your army, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by your ARMIGER models have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability.

stratagems.name: Let Duty Be Your Shield
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking units attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Mantle of the Mentor
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER model from your army, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
