stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your ARMIGER models are eligible to shoot in a turn in which they Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Squires of the Hunt
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER model from your army, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: For each of your ARMIGER models that is within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove that ARMIGER model from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Mentor’s Pride
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While two or more ARMIGER models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, each time each of those ARMIGER models makes an attack, you can re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Fables of Nightmare
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While two or more ARMIGER models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, melee weapons equipped by those ARMIGER models have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Tales of Heroism
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While two or more ARMIGER models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, each time one of those ARMIGER models makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and/or the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Martial Tuition
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While two or more ARMIGER models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, once per turn, you can target one of those ARMIGER models with the Counter‑offensive Stratagem for 0CP.

stratagems.name: Courageous Stand
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

stratagems.name: Titanic Duel
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER, TITANIC or WALKER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Moment of Glory
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" provided your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Hero’s Tread
stratagems.when: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: Your Level of Control over that objective marker is 5 (unless it would otherwise be higher), until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Driven By The Past
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Warrior
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Herald of Triumph
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. When the bearer ends a Charge move, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Wyrmslayer Divination
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. In your Shooting phase, when the bearer is selected to shoot, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then until the end of the phase, each time it makes an attack that targets a unit that can FLY, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Pennant of Silvered Fury
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. When the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability.

enhancements.name: Crushing Condemnation
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. When the bearer is selected to fight, after resolving its attacks, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Strength from Exile
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.&x20;
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.&x20;
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 9" of your unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Noble Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 4+, adding 1 to the result if it is an ARMIGER unit, instead of only a 6.

stratagems.name: Survivor of Strife
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Point-Blank Barrage
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when making ranged attacks with Blast weapons, models in your unit can target enemy units within Engagement Range of your unit (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, until the end of the phase, your unit does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, but each time a model in your unit makes an attack with a Blast weapon that targets a unit within Engagement Range of your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll of 1, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all of its attacks have been resolved.

stratagems.name: Flanking Manoeuvres
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER unit from your army that is within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Full Tilt
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is an ARMIGER or DESTRIER unit.

enhancements.name: Mysterious Guardian
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. The bearer has the Deep Strike ability. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your subsequent Movement phase, set the bearer up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9” horizontally away from all enemy units. If the battle ends and the bearer is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed.

enhancements.name: Sanctuary
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Bringer of Justice
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Improve the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Hunter’s Eye
enhancements.description: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

army_rules.name: Reanimation Protocols
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **NECRONS**, at the end of your Command phase, each unit from your army with this ability that is on the battlefield activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds. Each time such a unit reanimates a wound:

■ If that unit contains one or more models with fewer than their starting number of wounds remaining, select one of those models; that model regains one lost wound.
■ If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength, one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining.

Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens.

***Example**: A unit of Lokhust Destroyers (which have a Wounds characteristic of 3) activates its Reanimation Protocols. The unit had a Starting Strength of 3, but currently contains 2 models, and one of those models has lost 1 wound. A 3 is rolled to see how many wounds are reanimated. The first of these reanimated wounds restores the wounded Lokhust Destroyer back to 3 wounds. The second of these reanimated wounds returns the destroyed Lokhust Destroyer to the battlefield with 1 wound remaining. The third of these reanimated wounds restores one of the remaining lost wounds to the same Lokhust Destroyer that was just returned. The unit now contains 3 models, two of which have 3 wounds remaining and one of which has 2 wounds remaining.*

stratagems.name: Molecular Targeting
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll. If your unit has the CRYPTEK keyword, you can also ignore any or all modifiers to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Untapped Power
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Techno‑sorcerous Augmentations Detachment Rule, you can select one additional ability from those available.

stratagems.name: Synergistic Empowerment
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly NECRONS model (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 12" of a CRYPTEK model in your unit. Until the end of the phase, that friendly NECRONS model has the CRYPTEK keyword.

stratagems.name: Potentiality Syphon
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Command phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army within range of one or more objective markers.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate. If it is a CRYPTEK unit, it reanimates an additional 1 wound.

stratagems.name: Microscarab Swarm
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the NECRON WARRIORS keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit has the IMMORTALS keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Animus Curse
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly NECRONS model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Quantum Abacus
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if it is within range of one or more objectives: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Atomic Disintegrators
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment rule, you can also select from the following abilities: [ANTI‑MONSTER 5+], [ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+].

enhancements.name: Gauntlet of Compression
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Gravitic Bolas
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding TITANIC units); until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

stratagems.name: Merciless Reclamation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.&x20;
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Unyielding Forms
stratagems.when: &x20;Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.&x20;
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Chronoshift
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Dimensional Tunnel
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can move horizontally through models and terrain features.

stratagems.name: Endless Servitude
stratagems.when: End of your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) from your army that is within range of one or more objective markers you control.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

stratagems.name: Reactive Reposition
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: &x20;One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) that was the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: Dread Majesty (Aura)
enhancements.description: OVERLORD or CATACOMB COMMAND BARGE model only. While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Miniaturised Nebuloscope
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Demanding Leader
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Chrono-impedance Fields
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in that unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Methodical Murder
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

stratagems.name: Image of Death
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Spreading Madness
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within Engagement Range of one or more friendly units, add 2 to the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Mortis Protocols
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after the first time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army destroys an enemy unit this turn.
stratagems.target: One friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 9" of that DESTROYER CULT unit.
stratagems.effect: The friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

stratagems.name: Driven to Butchery
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

stratagems.name: Unnatural Aggression
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

enhancements.name: Destroyer Ankh
enhancements.description: CATACOMB COMMAND BARGE or OVERLORD model only. The bearer has the DESTROYER CULT keyword. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Murdermind
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. The bearer has the DESTROYER CULT keyword and during the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a DESTROYER CULT unit (excluding CHARACTER units). If you do, the bearer’s unit cannot contain any models without the DESTROYER CULT keyword. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.

enhancements.name: Mask of the Nekrosor
enhancements.description: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Cursed Circlet
enhancements.description: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from the bearer’s unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, the bearer’s unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer’s unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but the bearer’s unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle‑shocked.

stratagems.name: Pitiless Hunters
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Blood-fuelled Cruelty
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that started the phase within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move, but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: The Spoor of Frailty
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your unit makes an attack that targets a unit below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well

stratagems.name: Murderous Reanimation
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has just destroyed an enemy unit, or just caused an enemy unit that was not Below Half-strength to become Below Half-strength.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

stratagems.name: Insanity’s Ire
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed by the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move, but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Masks of Death
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Eternal Madness
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. In the Fight phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Ingrained Superiority
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Soulless Reaper
enhancements.description: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6: on a 3+, that unit cannot Fall Back this phase and must Remain Stationary.

enhancements.name: Eldritch Nightmare
enhancements.description: DESTROYER CULT model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Reanimation Crypts
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Your NECRONS WARLORD.
stratagems.effect: For each of your NECRONS units in Reserves, that Reserves unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

stratagems.name: Cosmic Precision
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike or Hyperphasing abilities this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

stratagems.name: Hyperphasic Recall
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS INFANTRY unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly MONOLITH model.
stratagems.effect: Remove your INFANTRY unit from the battlefield and then set it back up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of your MONOLITH model and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Dimensional Corridor
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield this turn using the Eternity Gate ability of a MONOLITH model that started the turn on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Your unit is eligible to charge this phase.

stratagems.name: Quantum Deflection
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Entropic Damping
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TITANIC model from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 18" of the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

enhancements.name: Dimensional Overseer
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add one to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Hyperphasing rule.

enhancements.name: Arisen Tyrant
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the bearer’s unit was set up on the battlefield this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

enhancements.name: Hyperspatial Transfer Node
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Osteoclave Fulcrum
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Entrophasic Aura Targeting
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is unravelling, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Chronodistortion
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 if the attacking unit is unravelling: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Disharmonisation Cascade
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a NECRONS MONSTER model from your army is destroyed, before making its Deadly Demise roll.
stratagems.target: That NECRONS MONSTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

stratagems.name: Mass Transmogrification
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a NECRONS MONSTER unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: One friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS) within 6" of that Monster unit.
stratagems.effect: If that enemy unit was unravelling at the start of the phase, your friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

stratagems.name: Molecular Erosion
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS MONSTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one unravelling enemy unit visible to your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from the result. If that test is failed, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Phase Melding
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an unravelling enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit
stratagems.effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

stratagems.name: Enslaved Artifice
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Nanoassembly Protocols
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Suffer No Rival
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Your Time Is Nigh
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after your opponent’s WARLORD is destroyed.
stratagems.target: Your NECRONS WARLORD.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: Sentinels of Eternity
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH PRAETORIANS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Territorial Obsession
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. If your unit has the VEHICLE keyword, add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic instead.

enhancements.name: Honourable Combatant
enhancements.description: OVERLORD model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy CHARACTER unit, your opponent loses 1CP if they have any.

enhancements.name: Unflinching Will
enhancements.description: OVERLORD model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] and [ANTI-INFANTRY 5+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Warrior Noble
enhancements.description: OVERLORD model only. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Eternal Conqueror
enhancements.description: OVERLORD model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Curse of the Cryptek
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly CANOPTEK model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Cynosure of Eradication
stratagems.when: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army that is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

stratagems.name: Solar Pulse
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker within 18" of your CRYPTEK model. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by friendly NECRONS models have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting units within range of that objective marker.

stratagems.name: Reactive Subroutines
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Countertemporal Shift
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Suboptimal Facade
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge and is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

enhancements.name: Dimensional Sanctum
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Hyperphasic Fulcrum
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, if that unit is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Autodivinator
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. Each time your opponent gains a CP as the result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP

enhancements.name: Metalodermal Tesla Weave
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. Once per phase, when an enemy unit selects the bearer’s unit as a target of a charge, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Hungry Void
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. In addition, if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 (this is not cumulative with any other modifiers that improve Armour Penetration).

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Conquering Tyrant
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within half range, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll the Hit roll for that attack instead.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Eternal Revenant
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.
stratagems.restrictions: Each model can only be targeted with this Stratagem once per battle.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Undying Legions
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds (or D3+1 wounds if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit).

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Sudden Storm
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. In addition, if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your unit.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Vengeful Stars
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a NECRONS unit from your army.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS CHARACTER unit from your army that was within 6" of that NECRONS unit when it was destroyed.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has resolved its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

enhancements.name: Veil of Darkness
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove that unit from the battlefield. Then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

enhancements.name: Nether-realm Casket
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Phasal Subjugator (Aura)
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding CHARACTER units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Enaegic Dermal Bond
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability

army_rules.name: Waaagh!
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **ORKS**, once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, you can call a Waaagh!. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your army and:

■ Units from your army with this ability are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced.
■ Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models from your army with this ability.
■ Models from your army with this ability have a 5+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Armoured Duellists
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Mount up, Ladz
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ORKS INFANTRY unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Mekanised Brutality
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One BATTLEWAGON, KILL RIG or HUNTA RIG unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a unit disembarks from your unit after your unit makes a Normal move, that disembarked unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Run ’em Down
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One BATTLEWAGON, KILL RIG or HUNTA RIG unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select up to two other friendly ORKS VEHICLE or ORKS MONSTER units within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit and each unit you selected are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

stratagems.name: Impervious
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One BATTLEWAGON, KILL RIG or HUNTA RIG unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Yooz in Trouble Now
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One BATTLEWAGON, HUNTA RIG or KILL RIG model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: One ORKS INFANTRY unit embarked within your model can disembark and make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in that unit move a number of inches up to this result, but that unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Runnin’ Boots
enhancements.description: ORKS INFANTRY CHARACTER model only. Each time you make a Charge roll for the bearer’s unit, if that unit disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, add 1 to the result.

enhancements.name: Blitzkaptin
enhancements.description: ORKS CHARACTER model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer’s unit (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is on the battlefield, select up to three ORKS VEHICLE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Supercharged Squig Oil
enhancements.description: MEK model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls for the selected VEHICLE model’s unit.

enhancements.name: Tuff Git
enhancements.description: ORKS INFANTRY CHARACTER model only. At the end of a phase in which the bearer’s unit disembarked from a TRANSPORT, if that unit is Battle‑shocked, it is no longer Battle‑shocked.

stratagems.name: Dakkastorm
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. While targeting a unit within 9", they have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this and the Blitza Fire Stratagem in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Blitza Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability and, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within 9", a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this and the Dakkastorm Stratagem in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Full Throttle
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a SPEED FREEKS unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That SPEED FREEKS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Speediest Freeks
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit is a VEHICLE unit with an unmodified Toughness characteristic of 8 or less, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save instead.

stratagems.name: Squig Flingin’
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit from your army ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: That SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 9" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test and, when doing so, subtract 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: More Gitz Over ’Ere!
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

enhancements.name: Wazblasta
enhancements.description: DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Fasta Than Yooz
enhancements.description: ORKS INFANTRY model only. Each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a TRANSPORT after that TRANSPORT has made a Normal move, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

enhancements.name: Squig-hide Tyres
enhancements.description: DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

enhancements.name: Speed Makes Right
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or a TRANSPORT the bearer is embarked within) is within 9" of one or more enemy units, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

stratagems.name: Stalkin’ Taktiks
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA INFANTRY or BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack targets your unit, models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack. In addition, if your unit has the Infantry keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability.

stratagems.name: Drag It Down
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets your Prey, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

stratagems.name: Where D’ya Fink You’re Going?
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA INFANTRY or BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Instinctive Hunters
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Momentum
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That BEAST SNAGGA unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). If that enemy unit is your Prey, roll three additional D6.

stratagems.name: Dat One’s Even Bigga!
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. In addition, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit, provided one of the targets of that charge is your Prey.

enhancements.name: Glory Hog
enhancements.description: BEASTBOSS ON SQUIGOSAUR model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Skrag Every Stash!
enhancements.description: BEAST SNAGGA model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

enhancements.name: Proper Killy
enhancements.description: BEAST SNAGGA model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Surly As A Squiggoth
enhancements.description: BEASTBOSS ON SQUIGOSAUR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Klankin’ Klaws
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS WALKER unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit and, if you chose to push it, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons and they have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well.

stratagems.name: Bigger Shells For Bigger Gitz
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One MEK, ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Wound roll. If you chose to push it, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well.

stratagems.name: Dakka! Dakka! Dakka!
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If you chose to push it, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well.

stratagems.name: Extra Gubbinz
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Superfuelled Boiler
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ORKS WALKER unit from your army has been selected to Advance.
stratagems.target: That ORKS WALKER unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for your unit and ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Conniving Runts
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One GRETCHIN unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move.

enhancements.name: Smoky Gubbinz
enhancements.description: MEK model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Supa-glowy Fing
enhancements.description: MEK model only. In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to the bearer, then roll one D6: on a 1‑2, that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test; on a 3‑4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5‑6, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Press It Fasta!
enhancements.description: MEK model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, when rolling to determine which ability that unit’s weapons gain from the Try Dat Button! Detachment rule, roll one additional D6: until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit gain both Button Effects generated by those rolls. If a duplicate Button Effect is rolled, it has no additional effect.

enhancements.name: Gitfinder Gogglez
enhancements.description: MEK model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Unbridled Carnage
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: ’Ard as Nails
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army (excluding GROTS, MONSTER and VEHICLE units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Mob Rule
stratagems.when: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One MOB unit from your army that contains 10 or more models and is not Below Half‑strength.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly Battle‑shocked ORKS INFANTRY unit within 6" of that Mob unit. That ORKS INFANTRY unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.

stratagems.name: ’Ere We Go
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for your unit.

stratagems.name: Careen!
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ORKS VEHICLE unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That destroyed ORKS VEHICLE unit, if you rolled a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move over enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) as if they were not there.

stratagems.name: Orks is Never Beaten
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Follow Me Ladz
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Headwoppa’s Killchoppa
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

enhancements.name: Kunnin’ but Brutal
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Supa-Cybork Body
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: On Da Move
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back or Advanced (unless it used its turbo this turn).

stratagems.name: Mobile Dakkastorm
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a Speed Freeks or Trukk unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding attacks made with Indirect Fire weapons). Until the end of the phase, each time a model in a SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

stratagems.name: Ded Killy Construction
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability and, if your unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons.

stratagems.name: Dust Trails
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Evasive Manoova
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Speshul Ammo
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding Torrent weapons) have the [ANTI‑MONSTER 4+] and [ANTI‑VEHICLE 4+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Kustom Shokk Box
enhancements.description: DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE model only. Each time the bearer uses its turbo, its unit can move horizontally through terrain features.

enhancements.name: Dakkamek
enhancements.description: MEK model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by the selected Vehicle model have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Supa-Burney Fuel
enhancements.description: DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE model only. Change the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s killa jet – burna weapon to 3D6, and change the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s killa jet – cutta weapon to 3.

enhancements.name: Master Meknologist
enhancements.description: BIG MEK model only. Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Armed To Da Teef
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Cut’ Em Down
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if a Waaagh! is active for your unit, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

stratagems.name: Hulking Brutes
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Crushing Impact
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound for each 4+ instead.

stratagems.name: Too Arrogant To Die
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not shot or fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if a Waaagh! is active for your unit. On a 5+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can shoot or fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Always Lookin’ Fer A Fight
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army that destroyed that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3". If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, it can move up to 6" instead.

enhancements.name: Tellyporta
enhancements.description: WARBOSS IN MEGA ARMOUR model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

enhancements.name: Big Gob
enhancements.description: INFANTRY WARBOSS model only. At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement range of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test, and when doing so, subtract 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Da Biggest Boss
enhancements.description: INFANTRY WARBOSS model only. Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

enhancements.name: ’Eadstompa
enhancements.description: INFANTRY WARBOSS model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If that unit is Below Half‑strength, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Competitive Streak
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit contains 10 or more models, re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Bulldozer Brutality
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to fight, when determining which models in your unit are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

stratagems.name: Tide of Muscle
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, add 1 to the Charge roll and, if your unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Braggin’ Rights
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Two BOYZ units from your army that are within 6" of each other.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, while those two units are within 6" of each other, they both count as containing 10 or more models for the purpose of your Detachment rule, any Enhancements models from your army have and any Stratagems you use.

stratagems.name: Come On Ladz!
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Return up to D3+2 destroyed models to your unit (excluding CHARACTER models).

stratagems.name: Go Get ’Em!
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your unit can make a Go Get ’Em! move. To do so, roll one D6: each model in your unit can move a distance in inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. If your unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

enhancements.name: Ferocious Show Off
enhancements.description: ORKS INFANTRY model only. Each time the bearer fights, while resolving those attacks, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer’s unit contains 10 or more models, while resolving those attacks, add 3 to the Strength characteristic instead.

enhancements.name: Brutal But Kunnin’
enhancements.description: ORKS INFANTRY model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or is embarked within a TRANSPORT that is on the battlefield), roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the bearer’s unit contains 10 or more models: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Bloodthirsty Belligerence
enhancements.description: ORKS INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for that unit. While that unit contains 10 or more models, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit as well.

enhancements.name: Raucous Warcaller
enhancements.description: ORKS INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit always counts as containing 10 or more models for the purposes of your Detachment rule and any Stratagems you use.

stratagems.name: Fight Proppa
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS INFANTRY or ORKS MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

stratagems.name: Krunchin’ Descent
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a STORMBOYZ unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That STORMBOYZ unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Dat’s Ours
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Taktikal Retreat
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ORKS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ORKS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: On To Da Next
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Ded Sneaky
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KOMMANDOS or STORMBOYZ unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Skwad Leader
enhancements.description: WARBOSS INFANTRY model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a KOMMANDOS unit. While leading a KOMMANDOS unit, it has the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities.

enhancements.name: Mek Kaptin
enhancements.description: BIG MEK, BIG MEK IN MEGA ARMOUR or BIG MEK WITH SHOKK ATTACK GUN model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a FLASH GITZ unit. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.
keywords: Big Mek with Shokk Attack Gun

enhancements.name: Mork’s Kunnin’
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ORKS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Gob Boomer
enhancements.description: WARBOSS or MEK model only. Each time the bearer issues Taktiks, it can do so to a friendly ORKS INFANTRY or ORKS MOUNTED unit within 18", instead of 6".

stratagems.name: Orks Is Still Orks
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re‐roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re‐roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Long, Uncontrolled Bursts
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Huge Show-offs
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS WALKER unit (excluding KILLA KANS) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, improve your unit’s Move, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1, and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Get Stuck In, Ladz!
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit (excluding GRETCHIN) from your army.
stratagems.effect:
Until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh! this battle.

Designer’s Note: This means that any abilities that are in effect while the Waaagh! is active for your army will be in effect for your unit.

stratagems.name: Call Dat Dakka?
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

stratagems.name: Speshul Shells
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 18", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Da Gobshot Thunderbuss
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities.

enhancements.name: Dead Shiny Shootas
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Targetin’ Squigs
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Zog Off and Eat Dakka!
enhancements.description: ORKS model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Bash and Grab
stratagems.when: The Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of the loot objective, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Boardin’ Rush
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Grab and Bash
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army (excluding GRETCHIN units) that is within range of the loot objective.
stratagems.effect:
Until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh! this battle.

Designer’s Note: This means that any abilities that are in effect while the Waaagh! is active for your army will be in effect for your unit.

stratagems.name: Deck Fraggers
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
