stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but unless it is making a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

stratagems.name: Pinning Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, after your unit has shot, select one enemy CHARACTER, MONSTER, or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

stratagems.name: Thunderous Pursuit
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit has the SPACE WOLVES INFANTRY or THUNDERWOLF CAVALRY keywords, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" instead.

stratagems.name: Impetuosity
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WULFEN INFANTRY or BLOOD CLAWS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, after that enemy unit has shot, if one or more models in your unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, your unit can make an Impetuous move. To do so, roll one D6: your unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Coordinated Strike
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Wolf-touched
enhancements.description: SPACE WOLVES model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of the bearer. In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a WULFEN INFANTRY unit.

enhancements.name: Hunter’s Guile
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three THUNDERWOLF CAVALRY, WULFEN and/or BLOOD CLAWS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Elder’s Guidance
enhancements.description: SPACE WOLVES model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, if the bearer is leading a BLOOD CLAWS unit, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Helm of the Beastslayer
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time an attack made by a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE model targets the bearer’s unit, reduce the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Chilling Howl
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if that unit is Below Half‑strength.

stratagems.name: Stalking Wolves
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability.

stratagems.name: Onrushing Storm
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Preytaker’s Eye
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] abilities. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have that ability.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Runes of Claiming
stratagems.when: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

enhancements.name: Wolves’ Wisdom
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. The bearer’s unit can declare a charge against one or more units within 6" instead of within 3" when using The Great Wolf Watches Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Foes’ Fate
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

enhancements.name: Fangrune Pendant
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Longstrider
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. You can re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Onslaught
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: Two ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, or one SPACE WOLVES BEASTS unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Marked for Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Two ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army (excluding BEASTS) that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to both of your units. Until the end of the phase, models in your units can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and each time a model in one of your units makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Envelop and Ensnare
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Territorial Advantage
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed by an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Chosen Prey
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SPACE WOLVES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That SPACE WOLVES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Bounding Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES INFANTRY or SPACE WOLVES BEASTS unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but unless it is making a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

enhancements.name: Swift Hunter
enhancements.description: SPACE WOLVES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 7" ability.

enhancements.name: Fenrisian Grit
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Wolf Master
enhancements.description: SPACE WOLVES model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly SPACE WOLVES unit within 9" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, teeth and claws and Tyrnak and Fenrir weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: Feral Rage
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add an additional 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons.

stratagems.name: The Foe Foreseen
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Eye of the Pack
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Grimnar’s Command
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Hunting Pack from the Master of Wolves Detachment rule. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hunting Pack is active for your unit instead of any other Hunting Pack that is active, even if you have already selected that Hunting Pack this battle.

stratagems.name: Fenrisian Ferocity
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within Engagement Range of them.

stratagems.name: Unrelenting Hunters
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a SPACE WOLVES unit, until the end of the turn, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Battle Instincts
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: Grimnar’s Mark
enhancements.description:
ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR CAPTAIN model only. Once per battle round, from the second battle round onwards, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a WOLF GUARD TERMINATORS unit.

enhancements.name: Howlmaw
enhancements.description: WOLF PRIEST model only. At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 6" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Chariots of the Storm
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Skjald’s Foretelling
enhancements.description: WOLF GUARD BATTLE LEADER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Inspiring Presence
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Champion’s Guidance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Birth of a Saga
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One Wolf Guard Headtaker or Wolf Guard Terminator Pack Leader model from your army.
stratagems.effect:
Until the start of your next Command phase, your model has the CHARACTER keyword.

Designer’s Note: While in effect, your model’s unit is therefore a CHARACTER unit, meaning it can interact with the Heroes All rule (see Detachment Rules section), in addition to other rules that interact with CHARACTER units.

stratagems.name: Alpha Strike
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Heroic Resolve
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Countercharge
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

enhancements.name: Braggart’s Steel
enhancements.description: SPACE WOLVES model only. Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. If the bearer’s unit has achieved one or more Boasts, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons as well.

enhancements.name: Skjald
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time a SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army achieves a Boast, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Hordeslayer
enhancements.description: SPACE WOLVES model only. At the start of the Fight phase, if there are more enemy models than friendly models wholly within 6" of the bearer, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. If the bearer’s unit has achieved one or more Boasts, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic instead.

enhancements.name: Thunderwolf’s Fortitude
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

army_rules.name: Drones
army_rules.text:
If you have upgraded a model to have a drone, place a Drone token next to your model as a reminder. These do not count as models for any rules purposes.

Guardian Drone

Each time a model makes a ranged attack that targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Gun Drone

The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:

-

Marker Drone

The bearer’s unit has the **MARKERLIGHT** keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.

Missile Drone

The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:

-

Shield Drone

Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

army_rules.name: For the Greater Good
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **T’AU EMPIRE**, at the start of your Shooting phase you can select units from your army with this ability to become Observer units.

During your Shooting phase, for each Observer unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is eligible to shoot (excluding **FORTIFICATION** and Battle-shocked units] select one enemy unit that is visible to be marked as their Spotted unit until the end of the phase. Each enemy unit can only be marked as a Spotted unit once per phase.

Units from your army with the For the Greater Good ability (excluding Observer units) are Guided units while targeting one or more Spotted units.

Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your army in a Guided unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if the Spotted unit was marked by an Observer unit that has the Markerlight keyword, that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

stratagems.name: The Arro’kon Protocol
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that contains 6 or more models, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If that attack targets an enemy unit that contains 11 or more models, it has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead.

stratagems.name: Fail-safe Detonator
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model from your army is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That destroyed model’s unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even if that unit was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Before removing your model from play, if it has the Deadly Demise ability, do not roll for that ability; instead, you can choose whether the result of that roll is a 1 or a 6. If your model does not have the Deadly Demise ability, roll one D6 for each unit within 6" of it: on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: The Torchstar Gambit
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that can FLY whose attacks have been resolved this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, your unit cannot declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Grav-inhibitor Field
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test and you must roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit: for each 6, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: The Shortened Blade
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your  army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

stratagems.name: Stimm Injectors
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

enhancements.name: Puretide Engram Neurochip
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Starflare Ignition System
enhancements.description: T’au EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model only. At the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Internal Grenade Racks
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model only. The bearer has the GRENADES keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

enhancements.name: Prototype Weapon System
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model only. Each time the bearer is selected to shoot, select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the selected ability.

stratagems.name: Focused Fire
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Two T’AU EMPIRE units from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase, and one enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic by 1.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the fourth or fifth battle rounds.

stratagems.name: Combat Debarkation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Pinpoint Counter-offensive
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT units) from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a T’AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT units) from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Aggressive Mobility
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Pulse Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY unit (excluding KROOT units) from your army that has just shot, and one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2 from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

stratagems.name: Counterfire Defence Systems
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: Exemplar of the Mont’ka
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT SHAPER models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

enhancements.name: Strike Swiftly
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only. At the start of the battle, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, you can select up to two friendly T’AU EMPIRE units within 6" of the bearer that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Strategic Conqueror
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model’s Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Coordinated Exploitation
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT SHAPER models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

stratagems.name: A Trap Well Laid
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: After your unit has resolved its attacks this phase, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, unless the attacking unit is Battle-shocked, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Join the Hunt
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT INFANTRY or KROOT HOUNDS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
stratagems.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER units to Attached units. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

stratagems.name: The Grisly Feast
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: In your opponent’s next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Guerrilla Warriors
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a KROOT unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That KROOT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Hidden Hunters
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One KROOT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: EMP Grenades
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy VEHICLE unit is selected to shoot or fight.
stratagems.target: One KROOT GRENADES unit from your army within 8" of that enemy VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, worsen the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of that enemy VEHICLE unit’s weapons by 1.

enhancements.name: Kroothawk Flock
enhancements.description: KROOT model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

enhancements.name: Nomadic Hunter
enhancements.description: KROOT TRAIL SHAPER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

enhancements.name: Root-carved Weapons
enhancements.description: KROOT WAR SHAPER model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the [PRECISION] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

enhancements.name: Borthrod Gland
enhancements.description: KROOT FLESH SHAPER only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Reactive Impact Dampeners
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Experimental Weaponry
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time you roll one or more dice to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in your unit, you can re‐roll the result.

stratagems.name: Automated Repair Drones
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one BATTLESUIT model in your unit: that model regains up to D3+1 lost wounds.

stratagems.name: Experimental Ammunition
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect:
Select one of the following to apply to your unit until the end of the phase:

• Improve the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.
• Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1, and those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target the same unit with the Experimental Ammunition and Threat Assessment Analyser Stratagems in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Threat Assessment Analyser
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. You can instead select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [LETHAL HITS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities to apply to those weapons until the end of the phase.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target the same unit with the Experimental Ammunition and Threat Assessment Analyser Stratagems in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Neuroweb System Jammer
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE CRISIS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Supernova Launcher
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one airbursting fragmentation projector equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

enhancements.name: Thermoneutronic Projector
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one T’au flamer equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

enhancements.name: Plasma Accelerator Rifle
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one plasma rifle equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

enhancements.name: Fusion Blades
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one fusion blaster equipped by the bearer. Improve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon by 1, improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and that weapon has the [MELTA 4] ability

stratagems.name: A Tempting Trap
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. The first time you use this Stratagem, you must also select one objective marker that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone; until the end of the battle, this becomes your Trap objective marker.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Trap objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first or second battle rounds.

stratagems.name: Point-blank Ambush
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first or second battle rounds.

stratagems.name: Coordinate to Engage
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has just been selected as an Observer unit (see For the Greater Good).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if your unit has the Markerlight keyword, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Wall of Mirrors
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One STEALTH, GHOSTKEEL or COMMANDER SHADOWSUN unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Combat Embarkation
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge, and one friendly TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: Your unit embarks within that TRANSPORT.
stratagems.restrictions: Every model in your INFANTRY unit must be within 3" of that TRANSPORT and there must be sufficient transport capacity to embark the entire unit.

stratagems.name: Photon Grenades
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE GRENADES unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test, and until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

enhancements.name: Exemplar of the Kauyon
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT SHAPER models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of from the third.

enhancements.name: Precision of the Patient Hunter
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

enhancements.name: Solid-image Projection Unit
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three T’AU EMPIRE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Through Unity, Devastation
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT SHAPER models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

stratagems.name: Multisensory Scanning
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If it is a KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Alien Expertise
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If it is a KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced as well.

stratagems.name: Guided Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army (excluding KROOT and VESPID STINGWINGS units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit. If your unit is wholly within 9" of one or more KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS units from your army, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit instead.

stratagems.name: Experimental Modifications
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Interlocking Manouevres
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move. It cannot embark within a TRANSPORT at the end of this move if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.

stratagems.name: Pheromone Waypoints
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

enhancements.name: Student of Kauyon
enhancements.description: KROOT SHAPER model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three KROOT CARNIVORES or KROOT FARSTALKERS units from your army. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

enhancements.name: Admired Leader
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE model (excluding KROOT models) only. In your Command phase, you can select one KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit within 12" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1, and while such a unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Fanatical Convert
enhancements.description: KROOT model only. The bearer’s unit has the For the Greater Good ability (see Codex: T’au Empire).

enhancements.name: Transponder Lock Module
enhancements.description: T’AU EMPIRE WALKER model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. During your first Movement phase, when you set up the bearer’s unit, it must be set up within 12" of one or more friendly KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS units and not within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

army_rules.name: Cabal of Sorcerers
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **THOUSAND SONS**, at the start of your Shooting phase, one or more models from your army with this ability can attempt Rituals from those listed on the right. To do so, select one model from your army with this ability that has not yet attempted a Ritual this turn and select one Ritual no model from your army has attempted to manifest this turn, then take a Psychic test for that model by following the sequence below.

Psychic Test Sequence

**Roll 2D6**

-

**Channel the Warp**
(Optional)

-

Then, if one or more doubles or triples were rolled during this test, that model’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

If that model is not destroyed, the combined total of all the dice rolled during this test is the Psychic test result. If this equals or exceeds the Warp Charge value of the Ritual being attempted, that model manifests that Ritual and you resolve its effects.

Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. Until the end of the phase, each time a **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 10+, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Select one friendly **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. That unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 10+, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" instead. In either case, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of the manifesting model); that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 11+, that unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds instead.

Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. Until the end of the phase, each time a **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 12+, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 2 instead.

army_rules.name: Pact of Sorcery
army_rules.text: When mustering your army, unless specifically stated otherwise, you cannot select **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** as your Army Faction.

stratagems.name: Sulphurous Veil
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS or SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Ethereal Phantasm
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is wholly within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS units.

stratagems.name: Fractal Disjunction
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTERS) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Chronosorcerous Bleed
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER or SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

stratagems.name: Glimmershift Portal
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two SCINTILLATING LEGIONS units from your army (excluding MONSTERS), or one SCINTILLATING LEGIONS MONSTER unit from your army, if all of those units are more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Deceptive Glamour
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects targets for its attacks, it can only target your unit if there are no eligible SCINTILLATING LEGIONS targets for those attacks.

enhancements.name: Nethershriek Mind-Eater
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS or LORD OF CHANGE model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Diabolic Savant
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly SCINTILLATING LEGIONS units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

enhancements.name: Duplicitous Malediction
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS or LORD OF CHANGE model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three THOUSAND SONS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Tome of True Names
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Hex-Marked Armour
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Ensorcelled Infusion
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase, that is within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by VEHICLE models in your unit have the [PSYCHIC] ability and each time an attack is made with such a weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Mutate Landscape
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is mutated, and remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. While an objective marker is mutated and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Malevolent Animus
stratagems.when: Your Command phase
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your VEHICLE unit is malevolent. While a unit is malevolent, it can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

stratagems.name: Cyberspirit Machinations
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That VEHICLE unit, and one friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit within 6" of that VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your VEHICLE unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Warpflame Gargoyles
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. That enemy unit must then take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Warp Syphon
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, after you roll that additional D6 but before checking for doubles or triples, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one of those VEHICLE units; that VEHICLE unit suffers 1 mortal wound and you can re-roll that additional D6.

enhancements.name: Perplexing Cloak
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability

enhancements.name: Biomechanical Mutation
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE model within 6" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Warp-Cursed Runemaster
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE units, each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

stratagems.name: Kaleidoscopic Tempest
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and, if your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, each time an attack targets your unit, it has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

stratagems.name: Through The Veil
stratagems.when: Start of the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One RUBRIC MARINES or SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATORS unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.effect: If it is a RUBRIC MARINES unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Deep Strike ability. When your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is a SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATOR unit it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.restrictions: If a SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATORS unit is targeted with this Stratagem, it is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

stratagems.name: Warding Hex
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control, if that objective marker is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.&x20;

stratagems.name: Scouring Warpflame
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. After your unit has shot this phase, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Wrath of the Doomed
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Strands of Time
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic when it is targeted with this Stratagem, then until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Arcane Might
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

enhancements.name: Empowered Manifestation
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.

enhancements.name: Empyric Onslaught
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Noctilith Mantle
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

stratagems.name: Devastating Sorcery
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 9" to the Range characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in your unit, and each time a model in your unit makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Psychic Dominion
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all attacks made against your unit with Psychic weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability and all models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

stratagems.name: Destined by Fate
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a saving throw is failed for a THOUSAND SONS PSYKER model from your army. If you are using fast dice rolling, this Stratagem can still be used after rolling multiple saving throws at once.
stratagems.target: That PSYKER model.
stratagems.effect: Change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those attacks you failed a saving throw for.

stratagems.name: Desecration of Worlds
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Arcane Focus
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after you take a Psychic test for a THOUSAND SONS model from your army that Channelled the Warp (before resolving that Ritual).
stratagems.target: That THOUSAND SONS model.
stratagems.effect: Re-roll all of the D6 rolled for that Psychic test (including the additional D6 for Channelling the Warp).

stratagems.name: Egotistical Power
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Imbued Manifestation, Psychic Maelstrom or Wrath of the Immaterium ability (see Kindred Sorcery). Until the start of your next Command phase, that ability applies to your unit instead of any other Kindred Sorcery ability, even if you have already selected that ability this battle.

enhancements.name: Lord of Forbidden Lore
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

enhancements.name: Incandaeum
enhancements.description: EXALTED SORCERER model only. Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army has already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

enhancements.name: Umbralefic Crystal
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Eldritch Vortex of E’Taph
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

stratagems.name: Gift of Change
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS CHARACTER model from your army (excluding MONSTERS) that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, add one TZEENTCH CHAOS SPAWN unit containing one model to your army, and set it up as close as possible to where your model was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Warped Vicissitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TZAANGORS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Deranged Ferocity
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a TZEENTCH MUTANT unit from your army is selected to fi ght.
stratagems.target: That TZEENTCH MUTANT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", and when determining which models in it are eligible to fight, any models in it that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

stratagems.name: Blessed Transmutations
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER model from your army, and one friendly TZAANGORS unit that is below its Starting Strength and within 12" of that PSYKER model.
stratagems.effect: Return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTERS) to your TZAANGORS unit.

stratagems.name: Touched by Tzeentch
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TZEENTCH MUTANT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Twisted Mirage
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TZEENTCH MUTANT unit from your army that is arriving from Strategic Reserves this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units, or anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units if it is a MONSTER unit. In either case, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Warpmeld Dagger
enhancements.description: TZAANGOR SHAMAN model only. Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3 mortal wounds; if it is not destroyed as a result, add 1 to that Psychic test result for each of those mortal wounds suffered.

enhancements.name: Diamond of Distortion
enhancements.description: TZAANGOR SHAMAN model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Bray Lord
enhancements.description: SORCERER or INFERNAL MASTER model only. The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a TZAANGORS unit.

enhancements.name: Flowing Flesh
enhancements.description: TZAANGOR SHAMAN model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability and a Wounds characteristic of 5.

stratagems.name: Unwavering Phalanx
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One RUBRIC MARINES unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Ardent Automata
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a RUBRICAE unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That RUBRICAE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Inexorable Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One RUBRICAE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to Advance rolls made for it, and ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Revenge of the Rubricae
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after a THOUSAND SONS PSYKER model from your army is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One RUBRICAE unit from your army that was within 6" of that PSYKER model when it was destroyed.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your RUBRICAE unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target the enemy unit that just destroyed your PSYKER model (and only if it is an eligible target).

stratagems.name: Implacable Guardians
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One RUBRIC MARINES PSYKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit (excluding PSYKER models), subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Infernal Fusillade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all inferno bolt pistols, inferno boltguns, inferno combi‑bolters and inferno combi‑weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PSYCHIC] ability and a Strength characteristic of 5.

enhancements.name: Risen Rubricae
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select either two RUBRICAE BATTLELINE units from your army or one other RUBRICAE unit from your army; models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Arcane Thralls (Aura)
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. While a friendly RUBRICAE unit is within 9" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Rubricae
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a RUBRICAE model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Stave Abominus
enhancements.description: THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS D3] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

army_rules.name: Synapse
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **TYRANIDS**, while a **TYRANIDS** unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly **SYNAPSE** models, that **TYRANIDS** unit is said to be within Synapse Range of that model and of your army. While a **TYRANIDS** unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army:

■ Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, take that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6.
■ Each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

army_rules.name: Shadow in the Warp
army_rules.text: If your Army Faction is **TYRANIDS**, once per battle, in either player’s Command phase, if one or more units from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When you do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take a Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit takes such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6" of one or more **SYNAPSE** units from your army, subtract 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Channelling
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, while a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of the selected unit, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

stratagems.name: Irresistible Will
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the SYNAPSE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the attacking model’s unit is within 6" of your SYNAPSE unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Reinforced Hive Node
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: The Smothering Shadow
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army within 12" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Imperative Dominance
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Synaptic Imperative, even if you have already selected that imperative this battle. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your unit instead of any other Synaptic Imperative that is active for your army.

stratagems.name: Override Instincts
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army and made a Fall Back move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge this turn.

enhancements.name: Power of the Hive Mind
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS PSYKER model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of psychic weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Psychostatic Disruption
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS SYNAPSE model only. Enemy units that arrive on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer. In addition, once per battle, during the first or second battle round, when your opponent declares that a unit will arrive on the battlefield from Strategic Reserves, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Control
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS SYNAPSE model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: The Dirgeheart of Kharis (Aura)
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS SYNAPSE model only. While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen that unit’s Leadership characteristic by 1.

stratagems.name: Enfilading Emergence
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

stratagems.name: Tunnel Network
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more of your Tunnel Markers and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again, wholly within 9" of another Tunnel Marker you placed, and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Swarming Assault
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, friendly TYRANIDS units within 6" of your unit can re-roll Charge rolls.

stratagems.name: Retreat Below
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit or up to two BURROWER units from your army that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Optimisation
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One MAWLOC or TRYGON unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your unit has the SYNAPSE keyword.

stratagems.name: Replenishing Swarms
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army, wholly within 9" of one or more Tunnel Markers you placed.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds, or you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models with a Wounds characteristic of 1 to your unit, with their full wounds remaining, instead.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Strategy
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Tremor Senses
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three friendly TYRANIDS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Intellect
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Trygon Prime
enhancements.description: TRYGON model only. The bearer gains the SYNAPSE keyword. Improve the Strength and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Amplification
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If that unit is a TYRANID WARRIORS unit, select up to one ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army, that is not Battle‑shocked, within 6" of it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in those units makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1, and, if it is a TYRANID WARRIORS unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Restorative Impulse
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANID WARRIORS unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.&x20;
stratagems.effect: Return 1 destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) to your unit.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Micronodes
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANID WARRIORS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Parasitic Payload
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANID WARRIORS WITH RANGED BIO‑WEAPONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.&x20;
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. After your unit has resolved its shooting attacks this phase, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Shield
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANID WARRIORS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.&x20;
stratagems.effect: &x20;If that unit is a TYRANID WARRIORS unit, select up to one ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army, that is not Battle‑shocked, within 6" of it. Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Spontaneous Hypercorrosion
