stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: &x20;One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit and add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by TYRANID WARRIORS and WINGED TYRANID PRIME models in your unit.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Tyrant
enhancements.description: NEUROTYRANT model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a TYRANID WARRIORS unit.&x20;

enhancements.name: Ocular Adaptation
enhancements.description: TYRANID PRIME WITH LASH WHIP or WINGED TYRANID PRIME model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Sensory Assimilation
enhancements.description: TYRANID PRIME WITH LASH WHIP or WINGED TYRANID PRIME model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Elevated Might
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Swarm-guided Salvoes
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and until the end of the phase each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that model’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Rampaging Monstrosities
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Savage Roar
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that Battle-shock test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Massive Impact
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your model and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Untrammelled Ferocity
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect:
Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so:

■ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
■ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after its unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, your unit is Battle-shocked.

stratagems.name: Corrosive Viscera
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that cannot Fly is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

enhancements.name: Ominous Presence
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS MONSTER model only. Add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Enraged Reserves
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS MONSTER model only. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. It can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Null Nodules
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS MONSTER model only. Once per battle, when a Psychic Attack is allocated to the bearer, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

enhancements.name: Monstrous Nemesis
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS MONSTER model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Teeming Masses
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Swarming Masses
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and If your unit contains 15 or more models, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Bounding Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Goading
stratagems.when: Any phase, just before an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army makes a Surge move.
stratagems.target: That ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit
stratagems.effect: When making that Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit moves, and your unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker (instead of as close as possible to the closest enemy unit). All other rules for making Surge moves still apply.

stratagems.name: Preservation Imperative
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is treated as containing fewer than five models for the purpose of the [BLAST] ability.

stratagems.name: Unending Waves
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
stratagems.restrictions: Any destroyed CHARACTER units that were attached to your unit are not returned. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

enhancements.name: Relentless Hunger
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Naturalised Camouflage
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. At the start of the first battle round, select up to three friendly ENDLESS MULTITUDE units within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the battle round, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Piercing Talons
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Adrenalised Onslaught
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Piles In or Consolidates, models in this unit can move an additional 3".

stratagems.name: Surprise Assault
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a VANGUARD INVADER unit from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That VANGUARD INVADER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that was selected as the target of one or more of your unit’s attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the Battle-shock test was failed, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Assassin Beasts
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One VANGUARD INVADER INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Seeded Broods
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is in Reserves, or up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army that are in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up those selected units on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

stratagems.name: Unseen Lurkers
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One VANGUARD INVADER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6". Your opponent can select new targets for the attacking unit’s attacks.

stratagems.name: Invisible Hunter
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army, or one TYRANIDS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.restrictions: The targeted units must be more than 3" away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Hypersensory Scillia
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: Up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army that are within 9" of that enemy unit, or one other TYRANIDS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Those selected units can each make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

enhancements.name: Hunting Grounds
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your opponent sets up a Reserves unit on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 2+, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Chameleonic
enhancements.description: VANGUARD INVADER model only. The bearer has the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets the bearer’s unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Stalker
enhancements.description: VANGUARD INVADER model only. At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Neuronode
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three VANGUARD INVADER units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Rapid Regeneration
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: Adrenal Surge
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army and are eligible to fight, or one other TYRANIDS unit from your army that is eligible to fight.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in any of those selected units makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Death Frenzy
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Overrun
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before a TYRANIDS unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" as long as your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, instead of making that Consolidation move, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Predatory Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Hyper-adaptation. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hyper-adaptation is active for those selected units in addition to any other that may be active for your army.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select the same Hyper-adaptation you selected at the start of the first battle round.

stratagems.name: Endless Swarm
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ENDLESS MULTITUDE units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: You can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to each of those selected units.

enhancements.name: Alien Cunning
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three TYRANIDS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Perfectly Adapted
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll, one Advance roll, one Charge roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Lynchpin
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of the bearer, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

enhancements.name: Adaptive Biology
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. At the start of any turn, if the bearer has fewer than its starting number of wounds remaining, until the end of the battle, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: Rapacious Hunger
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that just destroyed an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit immediately Regenerates (See Feed the Swarm). When doing so, if your unit is a HARVESTER unit and you choose for one model to regain up to D3 lost wounds, that model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Broodguard Impulse
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your HARVESTER unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Ablative Carapace
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If your unit is within range of an objective marker you control, until the end of the phase models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: Reclaim Biomass
stratagems.when: Any phase, when a TYRANIDS unit from your army is destroyed, before the last model in it is removed from play.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that is within 6" of that destroyed unit.
stratagems.effect: Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit within 6" of your HARVESTER unit (See Feed the Swarm).

stratagems.name: Tyrannoformed
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Secure Biomass
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a HARVESTER unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit as well.

enhancements.name: Regenerating Monstrosity
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only (excluding MONSTERS models). The bearer’s unit can be regenerated up to twice per phase, instead of once.

enhancements.name: Instinctive Defence
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly HARVESTER units, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP. In addition, while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly HARVESTER units, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Biophagic Flow (Aura)
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. While a friendly HARVESTER model is within 12" of the bearer, when using the Feed the Swarm ability, that HARVESTER model can Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit that is within 9" of it, instead of one within 6".

enhancements.name: Parasitic Biomorphology
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. The first time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly HARVESTER units, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

army_rules.name: Prioritised Efficiency
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **LEAGUES OF VOTANN, LEAGUES OF VOTANN** units from your army have one of two abilities: Hostile Acquisition or Fortify Takeover (see below). During the battle, which ability those **LEAGUES OF VOTANN** units have will change depending on how many Yield points (YP) you currently have:

■ At the start of the battle, your units have Hostile Acquisition until the start of your next Command phase.
■ At the end of your Command phase, if you have fewer than 7YP, your units have Hostile Acquisition until the start of your next Command phase.
■ At the end of your Command phase, if you have 7YP or more, your units have Fortify Takeover until the start of your next Command phase.

Hostile Acquisition

■ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll.
■ You can re‑roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

Fortify Takeover

■ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if this unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, add 1 to the Hit roll.
■ Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this unit’s Toughness characteristic and this unit is not a **VEHICLE**, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Yield Points

At the end of each player’s Command phase, you gain 1YP if you control one or more objective markers within your deployment zone, and, from the second battle round onwards, you gain 1 additional YP for each of the following conditions you satisfy:

■ You control one or more objective markers not within your deployment zone.
■ You control two or more objective markers not within your deployment zone.
■ You control more objective markers than your opponent. In your turn, YP gained in this way are always gained before checking which ability **LEAGUES OF VOTANN** units from your army have.

Whenever a rule allows you to spend YP, reduce the number of YP you have by that amount (your YP cannot go below 0), otherwise you cannot use that rule.

**Designer’s Note:** *This means you can use rules that let you gain or spend YP to influence which ability your units have – Hostile Acquisition or Fortify Takeover – depending on which will be most beneficial to you. Remember that your army only changes ability at the end of your Command phase, so you will sometimes need to plan ahead if you want your army to stay in or change ability.*

**Example:** *In her third turn, Freida’s units had the Hostile Acquisition ability, as she had 6YP at the end of her Command phase. In her fourth turn, at the end of her Command phase, she controls one objective marker within her deployment zone, and one objective marker not within her deployment zone, and her opponent controls two objective markers. Freida gains 2YP, so she now has 8YP, and her units now have the Fortify Takeover ability instead.*

*During her turn, Freida uses a Stratagem that allows her to spend YP. She spends 2YP, bringing her total down to 6YP. However, units from her army still have Fortify Takeover – it will only change if, at the end of her next Command phase, she still has fewer than 7YP.*

stratagems.name: Wall of Steel
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after an IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit, rolling two additional D6 if you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Unwavering Accuracy
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll; that attack’s Armour Penetration characteristic.

stratagems.name: First Concern
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit.
stratagems.effect: If your unit Remained Stationary in your Movement phase this turn, it can make a Normal move.

stratagems.name: Preventative Purge
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN or IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase. When doing so, models in your unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Cogitated Need
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move. When doing so, your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker.

stratagems.name: Delayed-Fire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time that enemy unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 1, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

enhancements.name: Fârstryder Node
enhancements.description: IRON‑MASTER or MEMNYR STRATEGIST model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

enhancements.name: Calculated Tenacity
enhancements.description: IRON‑MASTER or MEMNYR STRATEGIST model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Elders
enhancements.description: MEMNYR STRATEGIST model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if you spend YP using the Optimal Application Detachment rule when doing so, you can roll one D6: on a 2+, you gain 1YP.

enhancements.name: Graviton Vault
enhancements.description: IRON‑MASTER model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, and in the Fight phase, after the bearer has fought, select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Ranger Tactics
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if that attack targets an assailed unit and/or if your unit has the HERNKYN keyword, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Frontier Momentum
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERNKYN unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Exposed Flaws
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERNKYN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem and/or if that attack targets an assailed unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Claimstaker Reflex
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army (excluding ARTILLERY and VEHICLE units) that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" instead.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit cannot embark within a TRANSPORT as part of this move.

stratagems.name: Dispersed Formation
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY or LEAGUES OF VOTANN MOUNTED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets your unit, models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

stratagems.name: Adaptable Avarice
stratagems.when: Start of any phase, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend any number of YP. Once you have done so, if you have 6 or fewer YP, until the start of your next turn, units from your army have Hostile Acquisition instead.

enhancements.name: Eye for Weakness
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an assailed unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Writ of Acquisition
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, you gain 1YP for each assailed enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (to a maximum of 3YP).

enhancements.name: Surgical Saboteur
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, select one MONSTER or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks; until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is pinned.

enhancements.name: Nomad Strategist
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can spend up to 4YP. Select one HERNKYN unit from your army, and, for every 2YP you just spent, select up to one additional HERNKYN unit from your army. You can remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units (excluding assailed units).

stratagems.name: Honour of the Hold
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 3YP. Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 2 instead.

stratagems.name: Ancestral Sentence
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 3YP. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, until the end of the phase, those weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead.

stratagems.name: HunTR’s Mark
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Ordered Retreat
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Reactive Reprisal
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, can only target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

stratagems.name: Void Hardened
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Oathbound Speculator
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Dead Reckoning
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. At the end of the turn, if the bearer is on the battlefield and you spent no YP in that turn, you can gain 1YP.

enhancements.name: Iron Ambassador
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model equipped with an Autoch‑pattern combi‑bolter only. Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend up to 3YP and, until the end of the phase, add the number of YP you just spent to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons

enhancements.name: Ancestral Crest
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Once per turn, when you target the bearer’s unit with the Command Re‑roll Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend 1YP and reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

stratagems.name: Cyberstimm Infusion
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CTHONIAN BESERKS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Force
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Piles In or Consolidates, each model in that unit can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Augmented Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One CTHONIAN BESERKS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend up to 2YP. Until the end of the turn, add X" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, where X is the number of YP you spent during this use of this Stratagem, and your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Tectonic Fracture
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a CTHONIAN EARTHSHAKERS unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That CTHONIAN EARTHSHAKERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of your unit’s attacks this phase. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and, if you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

stratagems.name: Weavewërke Buttress
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Hidden Accessways
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CTHONIAN BESERKS, HEARTHKYN WARRIORS or HERNKYN YAEGIRS unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Dêlvewerke Navigator
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. In the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly CTHONIAN BESERKS unit visible to the bearer and then spend any number of YP. Return one destroyed model to that unit and then, for every 2YP you just spent, return up to one additional destroyed model to that unit.

enhancements.name: Multiwave System Jammer
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Once per battle, in your Movement phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly CTHONIAN unit that is in Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Quake Supervisor
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN ARTILLERY units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those ARTILLERY units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Piledriver
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to fight, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend up to 2YP and, until the end of the phase, add the number of YP you just spent to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

stratagems.name: Brëkkeknots
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One KÂHL, ÛTHAR THE DESTINED or EINHYR HEARTHGUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Fury of the Hearth
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One EINHYR HEARTHGUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. If you spend 1YP, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.

stratagems.name: Superior Craftsmanship
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Sure of Purpose
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Unyielding Aggression
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Materialisation Matrices
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that is in Reserves and has the Deep Strike ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.restrictions: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Bastion Shield
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the attacking model is within 12" of the bearer’s unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If you spend 1YP, until the end of the phase, if the attacking model is within 18" of the bearer’s unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 instead.

enhancements.name: Quake Multigenerator
enhancements.description: KÂHL model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Ironskein
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

enhancements.name: High Kâhl
enhancements.description: KÂHL model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Auxiliary Contract
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY or LEAGUES OF VOTANN MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Grand Artifice
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: New Horizons
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement range of one or more enemy units and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within
stratagems.effect: If your LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Mobile Exploitation
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERNKYN unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Alternatively, you can spend 2YP and target up to two HERNKYN units from your army that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units instead.
stratagems.effect: Remove your units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Optimal Expenditure
stratagems.when: The Fight phase
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 3YP. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP during this usage of this Stratagem, you can re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Privateer Arsenal
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 3YP. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP during this usage of this Stratagem, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1 instead.

enhancements.name: Mercenary Prospector
enhancements.description: KÂHL model only. Each time an enemy unit is destroyed by the bearer’s unit, gain 2YP.

enhancements.name: Metaphysical Brokerage
enhancements.description: MEMNYR STRATEGIST model only. At the end of your turn, if the bearer is on the battlefield and you gained fewer than 3YP this turn, you gain an amount of YP equal to the difference.

enhancements.name: Etacarn SB9 Targeting Implant
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Asset Manipulator
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. At the start of the Command phase, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the turn, while an enemy unit is within 3" of the bearer, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Bastion Running
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HEKATON LAND FORTRESS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Secure Positions
stratagems.when: End of any of your phases
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN TRANSPORT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit embarked within your TRANSPORT can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of your TRANSPORT. That unit cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

stratagems.name: Inexorable Efficiency
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Opportunistic Escalation
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding HEKATON LAND FORTRESS units) that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Vengeance Flare
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Select one friendly KAPRICUS or SAGITAUR unit within 6" of your INFANTRY unit. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, you can select one friendly HEKATON LAND FORTRESS unit within 6" of your INFANTRY unit instead. The selected unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase. When doing so, models in the selected unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

stratagems.name: Illuminated Priority
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Tactical Alchemy
enhancements.description: KÂHL model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control that are not within your deployment zone, you can spend 1YP. If you do, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Trivärg Cyber Implant
enhancements.description: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, or if you spend 2YP, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability.

enhancements.name: Precursive Judgement
enhancements.description: KÂHL model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within 6" of one or more friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN TRANSPORT units, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP and hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

enhancements.name: Signature Restoration
enhancements.description: IRON‑MASTER model only. Each time a friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN model is repaired using the bearer’s Forgewrought Expertise ability, that model regains 1 additional lost wound.

army_rules.name: Blessings of Khorne
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **WORLD EATERS**, at the start of the battle round, you can make a Blessings of Khorne roll. To do so, roll eight D6. You can then use those dice to activate up to two Blessings of Khorne (see below). Each Blessing of Khorne specifies the dice results it requires (where a number is specified, a double or triple of that value or higher is required). You can only activate each Blessing of Khorne once per battle round. Any unused dice from the Blessings of Khorne roll are then discarded. Once activated, each Blessing of Khorne applies to all units from your army with this ability until the end of the battle round.

**Example**: Ash makes a Blessings of Khorne roll, getting the following: 1, 2, 2, 2, 3, 4, 6, 6. First they use the two 6s to activate Warp Blades (which requires a double 5+ ), leaving the following dice: 1, 2, 2, 2, 3, 4. They then use the two 2s to activate Unbridled Bloodlust. Now that two Blessings of Khorne have been activated, no more can be activated and the remaining dice are discarded.

Unbridled Bloodlust

-

You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit.

Rage-Fuelled Invigoration

-

Each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

Total Carnage

-

Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Martial Excellence

-

Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

Warp Blades

-

Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability

Decapitating Strikes

-

Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an **INFANTRY** unit, that attack has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

stratagems.name: Hack and Slash
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and that made a charge move this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Frenzied Resilience
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Blood Offering
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Skulls for the Skull Throne!
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a WORLD EATERS unit from your army destroys a CHARACTER or MONSTER model.
stratagems.target: That WORLD EATERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Make a Blessings of Khorne roll and use the results to activate one Blessing of Khorne. Until the end of the battle round, that Blessing of Khorne is active in addition to any other Blessings of Khorne that are currently active.

stratagems.name: Apoplectic Frenzy
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, ,just after a KHORNE BERZERKERS unit from your army is selected to Advance.
stratagems.target: That KHORNE BERZERKERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Berzerker’s Wrath
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One KHORNE BERZERKERS unit from your army that can make a Blood Surge move as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll a D6 to determine how far models in your unit can move when they make their Blood Surge move. Instead, when making their Blood Surge move, these models can move up to 8".

enhancements.name: Berzerker Glaive
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Helm of Brazen Ire
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: Favoured of Khorne
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll up to two of the D6 rolled.

enhancements.name: Battle-lust
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit. In addition, while the Unbridled Bloodlust Blessing of Khorne is active for your army, add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Strength
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to an enemy model, if your unit has the EIGHTBOUND keyword and that enemy model is not a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack. If your unit has the EXALTED EIGHTBOUND keyword and that enemy model is a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack instead.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Resistance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Immortal Fury
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Rapid Manifestation
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One EXALTED EIGHTBOUND unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

stratagems.name: Warp Stalkers
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declare a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but, unless that move was a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

stratagems.name: Horrifying Violence
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

enhancements.name: Malicious Vigour
enhancements.description: SLAUGHTERBOUND model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Brazen Fury move, it is treated as having rolled a 6 for the distance the unit can be moved.

enhancements.name: Killing Clarity
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS DAEMON model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Frenzied Focus
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS DAEMON model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

enhancements.name: Violent Demise
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS DAEMON model only. The bearer’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6. In addition, the bearer has the Deadly Demise D3+1 ability, instead of the Deadly Demise D3 ability.

stratagems.name: Brazen Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll, or, if it is a VESSEL OF WRATH unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Aspire to Infamy
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KHORNE BERZERKERS or JAKHALS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within 8" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS CHARACTER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by non‑CHARACTER models in your unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Overshadowed by None
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY, WORLD EATERS MOUNTED or WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Punish the Craven
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY or WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if your unit is a VESSEL OF WRATH unit, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

stratagems.name: Meet Force With Force
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY, WORLD EATERS MOUNTED or WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. If your unit is a KHORNE BERZERKERS or VESSEL OF WRATH unit, you can re‑roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

stratagems.name: Gory Dedication
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy models with a melee attack this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

enhancements.name: Archslaughterer
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1. While the bearer is a VESSEL OF WRATH, improve the Damage characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

enhancements.name: Vox-Diabolus
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit with a melee attack, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is a VESSEL OF WRATH: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Avenger’s Crown
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Gateways to Glory
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE or WORLD EATERS MOUNTED model only. Each time the bearer makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end a Normal or Advance move within Engagement Range of them.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Fury
stratagems.when: Start of your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly WORLD EATERS unit within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in your WORLD EATERS unit have the [LANCE] ability. If the Daemonic Rage ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase those melee weapons also have the [TWIN-LINKED] ability.

stratagems.name: Blessing of Burning Blood
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army that is within 6" of a friendly WORLD EATERS unit that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your WORLD EATERS unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If the Boon of Blood ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase, models in your WORLD EATERS unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: A Worthy Skull
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS unit from your army has fought, and one or more enemy CHARACTER or MONSTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.target: That BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS unit.
stratagems.effect: You gain D3BTP and you can then spend one or more BTP you have to activate one of the Blood Tithe abilities.

stratagems.name: Summoned by Slaughter
stratagems.when: Any phase, when the last model in a unit is destroyed, before removing it from play. (If that unit is a TRANSPORT, any units embarked within that TRANSPORT model must disembark first.)
stratagems.target: One BLOODLETTERS unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 9" of that destroyed model and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, then remove the destroyed model from play.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Daemontide
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly BLOOD LEGIONS unit within 6" of your unit. One destroyed MOUNTED model, up to D3 destroyed BEAST models, or up to D6 destroyed INFANTRY models are returned to that BLOOD LEGIONS unit with their full wounds remaining.
stratagems.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models to Attached units.

stratagems.name: Murder-Call
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army that is on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Icon of War
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. While a friendly BLOOD LEGIONS unit is within 6" of the bearer, that unit has the Blessings of Khorne ability. If the Might of Khorne ability is active for your army, then while a friendly BLOOD LEGIONS unit is within 6" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

enhancements.name: Blood-Forged Armour
enhancements.description: BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+. If the bearer is destroyed, you gain 1 Blood Tithe point.

enhancements.name: Disciple of Khorne
enhancements.description: LORD ON JUGGERNAUT model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a BLOODCRUSHERS or FLESH HOUNDS unit. While leading one of these units, the bearer has the Deep Strike ability, and it has the BLOOD LEGIONS Faction keyword instead of the WORLD EATERS Faction keyword.

enhancements.name: Blade of Endless Bloodshed
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit with a melee attack, do not roll to gain a Blood Tithe point, you automatically gain 1 Blood Tithe point instead.

stratagems.name: Bloodthirsty Horde
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to fight, when determining which models in it are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

stratagems.name: Bloody Vengeance
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS MONSTER or WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit from your army that was just destroyed by an enemy unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a model in a JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Brazen Idol
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS MONSTER or WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Idol of Infinite Rage, Idol of Burning Wrath or Idol of Blessed Blood. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Idols of Khorne ability is active for your unit instead of any other Idols of Khorne ability that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that ability this battle.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

stratagems.name: In the Shadow of Brass Idols
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within 6" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS MONSTER units, or within 9" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC units, your unit has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: Fail Not The Blood God
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that model’s unit is within 6" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS MONSTER units, or within 9" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC units, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Drawn to the Slaughter
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
stratagems.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER units to Attached units.

enhancements.name: Chosen of the Blood God
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS MONSTER model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer’s Aura abilities.

enhancements.name: Butcher Lord
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS INFANTRY model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit. If attached to a GOREMONGERS unit, the bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Brazen Form
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS MONSTER model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Toughness characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Strategic Slaughter
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three JAKHALS and/or GOREMONGERS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Endless Pursuit of Violence
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY unit from your army and one friendly TRANSPORT that it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your WORLD EATERS INFANTRY unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Smash Through
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Aggressive Disembarkation
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: One WORLD EATERS unit embarked within your RHINO can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of your RHINO and can be set up within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Full-Throttle Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a WORLD EATERS unit disembarks from that model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Unrelenting Advance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your model can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this Stratagem and the Fury Unleashed Stratagem in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Fury Unleashed
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has one or more wounds remaining and was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: One KHORNE BERZERKERS unit embarked within your model can disembark and make a Blood Surge move.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this Stratagem and the Unrelenting Advance Stratagem in the same phase.

enhancements.name: Murderous Onslaught
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. If the bearer’s unit disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Aggressive Deployment
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Unleash Hell
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer or, if the bearer is embarked within a TRANSPORT, you can select that TRANSPORT model. Until the end of the phase, after the selected model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Infernal Infusion
enhancements.description: WORLD EATERS model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

army_rules.name: Templar Vows
army_rules.text:
If your Army Faction is **ADEPTUS ASTARTES,** at the start of the first battle round, select one of the following Vows to be active for **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army. While a Vow is active for a unit from your army, that unit has the associated ability shown below.

Abhor the Witch, Destroy the Witch

Each time this unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge have the **PSYKER** keyword, you can re-roll the Charge roll. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability while targeting **PSYKER** units.

Accept any Challenge, no Matter the Odds

Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of the target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Suffer Not the Unclean to Live

This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back, and each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

Uphold the Honour of the Emperor

If this unit has the **INFANTRY** keyword:

■ At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

■ If the mission you are playing features Actions, this unit is eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced.

army_rules.name: Space Marine Chapters
army_rules.text:
■ If an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit has a second Faction keyword on its datasheet, that Faction keyword is the name of that unit’s Chapter. For example, Marneus Calgar has both the **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** and **ULTRAMARINES** Faction keywords, and is therefore from the Ultramarines Chapter.

■ You cannot include units from more than one Chapter in your army.

■ If your army includes one or more **BLACK TEMPLARS** units, it cannot include any **ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER** models, and cannot include any of the following models that do not have the Black Templars keyword: **GLADIATOR LANCER**; **GLADIATOR REAPER**; **GLADIATOR VALIANT**; **IMPULSOR**; **REPULSOR**; **REPULSOR EXECUTIONER**.

■ If your army includes one or more **SPACE WOLVES** units, it cannot include any of the following units: **APOTHECARY**; **DEVASTATOR SQUAD**; **TACTICAL SQUAD**.

**DEATHWATCH**

■ Your army can include **ADEPTUS ASTARTES DEATHWATCH** units, but it cannot include any **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units drawn from any other Chapter.
■ With the exception of **KILL TEAM CASSIUS** (see *Legends: Agents of the Imperium*), your army cannot include any **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM DEATHWATCH** units.
